title: Senior Developer
description:
*Vi tror på ett samhälle format av framgångsrika företag där entreprenörskap och samhällsnytta går hand i hand. Att vara en del av Fortnox är att vara en del av en ständig förändring - en förändring där du själv bestämmer hur långt du vill nå. Vårt största fokus är att ge dig rätt förutsättningar att få leva din passion tillsammans med oss. Var du kommer ifrån är inte relevant - det är vart du är på väg som är intressant för oss. Precis som vi igår inte kunde drömma om det Fortnox som finns idag, så kan du vara med och forma vilka vi är imorgon.*


**Om tjänsten**


I Stockholm förstärker vi nu upp våra team som utvecklar finansiella applikationer och funktioner. Vi utvecklar hela funktioner "från ax till limpa" vilket innebär databearbetning, dataanalys och algoritmutveckling samt utveckling av både back-end och front-end funktioner. Allt för att förädla och skapa lösningar som förändrar hur svenska företag hanterar sina finanser.


Vi söker nu flera vassa utvecklare som vill kombinera “full stack”-utveckling med moderna språk och tekniker för att bygga system och funktioner som förenklar och förändrar den svenska finansmarknaden i grunden.
  

Vi arbetar med bl.a.:


* Frontend: JavaScript/TypeScript, React
* Backend: Java, Kotlin
* Integrationer och data: REST-API:er, SQL-databaser, Kafka
* Övrigt: Microservices, AI/Machine Learning, GitHub/Bitbucket

**Vi söker dig som**


* Har ett genuint intresse för programmering i allmänhet och har mycket goda kunskaper i flertalet programmeringsspråk. Är civilingenjör inom datateknik, teknisk fysik eller liknande, alternativt har motsvarande examen inom relevant område. Har flera års erfarenhet av professionell mjukvaruutveckling
* Är driven och gillar att få saker gjort, brinner för att lära sig nya saker och vill jobba tillsammans med andra kompetenta utvecklare
* Praktisk erfarenhet av att använda AI-assisterade verktyg inom programvaruutveckling
* Är flytande i svenska i såväl tal som skrift

**Vad du får**


På Fortnox bygger teamen sin egen teamkultur och ramverk. Teamen består av medlemmar med en hög kompetensnivå och som arbetar inom områden som är centrala inom Fortnoxs portfölj. Du kommer att ha möjlighet att utvecklas tekniskt genom att jobba tillsammans med dessa erfarna och kompetenta utvecklare samt ha stor möjlighet att påverka hur vi bygger och förädlar våra produkter.


Fortnox tror på ett liv i balans och ”Fortnox MåBra” är ett koncept som finns för ditt välmående och återhämtning. Vidare tror vi också på flexibilitet och möjlighet att arbeta enligt en hybridmodell. Vi har ett attraktivt läge och utformning av vårt kontor på Linnégatan 89 i Stockholm.


**Fortnox - mitt i företagslivet**
  

*Fortnox hjälper företag att starta, växa och utvecklas. Med smarta tekniska lösningar för företag och redovisningsbyråer, smidig finansiering och ett ekosystem av starka partnerskap är Fortnox ett nav för företagande i Sverige. Vi drivs av visionen om ett välmående samhälle format av framgångsrika företag.*


*Fortnox grundades 2001 med huvudkontor i Växjö. Läs mer på www.fortnoxgroup.com.*


**Välkommen med din ansökan!**


**Behandling av personuppgifter**


Vi på Fortnox värnar om din personliga integritet. När du skickar in din ansökan till oss kommer vi att behandla dina personuppgifter för att administrera rekryteringsprocessen. Personuppgiftsansvarig är det bolag som du söker arbete hos och är något bolag inom Fortnoxkoncernen. Du kan läsa integritetsmeddelandet i sin helhet på följande länk:


https://apps.fortnox.se/api/eula/document-v1/privacy-policy-recruiting

  


**Bra att veta**
----------------


**Arbetsort:** Stockholm


**Tillträde:** Snarast eller enligt överenskommelse


**Arbetstid:** Heltid


**Sista ansökningsdatum:** Urval och intervjuer sker löpande

title: Systemutvecklare
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.

 **Din profil (Skall krav)**  

* Minst 12 års erfarenhet
* Har 9-12 års erfarenhet av fullstack systemutveckling inom C# .NET, SQL, Blazor
* Har erfarenhet av att arbeta i GIT och ADO.
* Har djup teknisk kunskap, infranära utveckling
* Har lång erfarenhet av Continuous delivery
* Har erfarenhet av att arbeta med automatiserad applikationsnära övervakning
* Har erfarenhet att arbeta självständigt och i utvecklingsteam
* Kunskap om Agila utvecklingsmetoder, så som Scrum/Kanban
* Har erfarenhet av att migrera kod från äldre version till senare
* Har erfarenhet av att utveckla med hjälp av AI
* Tar ansvar för delområde, är självständig och kan leda en mindre grupp

  

**Sista ansökningdatum:** 19-06-2026 **Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**


Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.


En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.


Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.


Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?


Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.


Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.


Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?  

  

*Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.*

title: Data Engineer / BI-utvecklare
description:
Vi söker en erfaren Data Engineer / BI-utvecklare till ett uppdrag med fokus på moderna dataplattformar, dataflöden och analyslösningar. Rollen innebär att utveckla och förvalta robusta, skalbara och säkra datalösningar i en modern lakehouse-arkitektur där hög datakvalitet, prestanda och affärsnytta står i centrum.
  
  

Konsulten kommer att arbeta med att bygga och vidareutveckla data pipelines, datamodeller och transformationsflöden för analys och rapportering. Uppdraget omfattar hela kedjan från datainsamling och modellering till kvalitetssäkring, automatiserade tester och visualisering i Power BI. En viktig del av rollen är att omsätta verksamhetens behov till effektiva datalösningar och säkerställa att data hanteras på ett strukturerat, spårbart och kvalitativt sätt.
  
  

Vi söker dig som har god förståelse för säkerhet, skalbarhet och prestanda i moderna dataplattformar samt erfarenhet av att arbeta i agila team med fokus på samarbete och kunskapsöverföring.

title: Senior Developer Dynamics 365 SC&F
description:
At Sogeti, we believe the best is inside every one of us. Whether you are early in your career or at the top of your game, we’ll encourage you to fulfill your potential to be better. Through our shared passion for technology, our entrepreneurial culture , and our focus on continuous learning, we’ll provide everything you need to do your best work and become the best you can be.


**Senior Developer Dynamics 365 SC&F**
--------------------------------------

  

**Your role**


As a Microsoft Dynamics Developer with Sogeti, you will be involved in spearheading the development of modifications and extensions to Microsoft Dynamics 365 SC&F applications. You will analyze requirements, design technical solutions, and provide technical expertise in creating specifications for customizations or extensions.

  

*In this role you will play a key role in:*


* Spearheading the development of modifications and extensions to Microsoft Dynamics 365 SC&F applications.
* Analyzing requirements and designing technical solutions aligned with business goals, objectives, and architectural standards.
* Providing technical expertise in creating specifications for customizations or extensions on Microsoft Dynamics 365 SC&F solutions.
* Developing data migration procedures and integration services for seamless integration with legacy systems.
  

**Your profile**


* Proven experience in at least 5+ ERP projects (Dynamics AX 2012 or Dynamics 365 SC/Finance) for enterprise-class customers.
* Holistic expertise in solution design, data migration, integration, and Dynamics 365 configuration.
* Solid knowledge of Object-Oriented Programming, Morph X/X++, and AX entity & object model.
* Familiarity with Azure DevOps, SSRS, and electronic reporting.
* Preferred skills in D365, Power Pages, .Net/C#/X++, EDI, Dynamics AX ISV solutions, AIF, Workflows, SQL Admin, and Query tuning.
* Proficiency in Power Platform is a plus.
  

**What we believe you will enjoy** **about working here:**


* Innovative Environment: With us, you get the chance to work with the latest technology and be part of a dynamic team that loves creating value through innovation.
* Career Development: We care about your future and offer development programs and certifications in the latest technologies, so you can grow and become the best version of yourself.

**Application**

*As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.*


Part of the Capgemini Group, Sogeti makes business value through technology for organizations that need to implement innovation at speed and want a local partner with global scale. With a hands-on culture and close proximity to its clients, Sogeti implements solutions that will help organizations work faster, better, and smarter. By combining its agility and speed of implementation through a DevOps approach, Sogeti delivers innovative solutions in quality engineering, cloud and application development, all driven by AI, data and automation.

title: Senior Dynamics 365 CE Utvecklare
description:
På Sogeti tror vi att det bästa finns inom oss alla. Oavsett om du är i början av din karriär eller redan på toppen av ditt spel, kommer vi att uppmuntra dig att nå din fulla potential och bli bättre. Genom vår gemensamma passion för teknik, vår entreprenöriella kultur och vårt fokus på kontinuerligt lärande, kommer vi att ge dig allt du behöver för att göra ditt bästa arbete och bli den bästa versionen av dig själv.


**Job Description**
-------------------


**Senior utvecklare inom Microsoft Dynamics 365 CE**
Sogeti – flera orter i Sverige | Dynamics 365CE & Power Platform
Vill du vara med och skapa **framtidens CRM‑ och affärslösningar** tillsammans med några av Sveriges mest erfarna Dynamics‑konsulter?
  

Nu söker vi på **Sogeti** en **Senior utvecklare inom Microsoft Dynamics 365 Customer Engagement (CE)** som vill ta ett tekniskt helhetsansvar och göra verklig skillnad hos våra kunder.
**Om rollen**
Som senior CE‑utvecklare hos oss:
* arbetar du i **affärskritiska Dynamics‑projekt** hos kunder inom både offentlig och privat sektor
* tar du **tekniskt ansvar** för design, utveckling och kvalitet
* samarbetar tätt med arkitekter, funktionella konsulter och projektledare
* bidrar i **presales, estimering och tekniska lösningsförslag**
* stöttar och agerar mentor till mer juniora kollegor

Rollen motsvarar en **senioritet**, där du förväntas vara en trygg teknisk rådgivare och en självklar nyckelperson i teamet.
**Dina arbetsuppgifter**
* Utveckling i **Dynamics 365 CE / Dataverse**
* Utveckla och förvalta:
	+ C#‑plugins och custom workflow activities
	+ JavaScript/TypeScript (forms, commands, client‑side logik)
* Bygga och förvalta integrationer (Web API, Azure‑tjänster)
* Arbeta med **Power Platform** (Power Automate, Power Apps)
* Säkerställa god **ALM, CI/CD och kodkvalitet**
* Delta i arkitektur‑ och designbeslut
* Bidra till kompetensspridning och metodutveckling inom Dynamics‑gruppen

**Vi söker dig som har**
Flera års erfarenhet av utveckling i **Dynamics 365 CE**
  

Mycket goda kunskaper i **C#/.NET** och **JavaScript/TypeScript**
  

Erfarenhet av **Dataverse**, lösningshantering och säkerhetsmodell
  

Vana av **Azure DevOps / Git / CI‑CD**
  

Erfarenhet av integrationer mot andra system
  

Förmåga att ta tekniskt ansvar och leda genom kompetens
Det är meriterande om du har:
* Erfarenhet av **Power Platform i större lösningar**
* Arbetat i rollen som **Tech Lead eller teknisk mentor**
* Microsoft‑certifieringar inom Dynamics / Power Platform ex PL-200, PL-400 och PL-600

**Vem är du?**
Du är en **konsultmässig och lösningsorienterad utvecklare** som:
* gillar att kombinera teknik med affärsförståelse
* är trygg i dialog med kund
* delar gärna med dig av kunskap
* vill fortsätta utvecklas tillsammans med andra seniora specialister

**Därför Sogeti**
Hos oss får du:
* Arbeta i ett av **Sveriges starkaste Dynamics‑team**
* Tillgång till **kompetensnätverk, utbildningar och certifieringar**
* Möjlighet att påverka både **teknikval, arbetssätt och erbjudande**
* Trygga anställningsvillkor och balans mellan jobb och privatliv
* En kultur som bygger på **engagemang, samarbete och nyfikenhet**

**Redo att ta nästa steg?**
  

*Varmt välkommen med din ansökan redan idag, urval sker löpane! Vill du veta mer eller har frågor om tjänsten, vänligen kontakta Team Manager Emelie Thelin på emelie.thelin@sogeti.com.*  

Om Sogeti


Sogeti Sverige, en del av Capgemini-koncernen, skapar affärsvärde med teknologi för organisationer som behöver införa innovation snabbt och som vill ha en lokal partner med global skalbarhet. Med en hands-on-kultur och närhet till kunderna, implementerar Sogeti lösningar som hjälper organisationer att arbeta snabbare, bättre och smartare. Genom att kombinera agilitet och snabb implementation via en DevOps-ansats, levererar Sogeti innovativa lösningar inom test- och kvalitetssäkring, molnet och systemutveckling, förstärkta av AI, data och automation.

title: Stretch Amplify i Malmö söker Senior .NET utvecklare
description:
Vi söker fler kollegor som vill vara med och bidra till innovativa och effektiva lösningar!


På **Stretch Amplify** höjer vi våra kunders digitala utvecklingsförmåga med både teknik och metodik. Som agil utvecklingspartner hjälper vi våra kunder att ta vara på all den teknik som finns tillgänglig runt omkring oss för att skapa framtidens digitala tjänster och produkter.


Om du motiveras av att arbeta i utmanande projekt med ny teknik och affärsutveckling i tätt samarbete med våra kunder och kollegor så kommer du trivas hos oss!

**Om rollen**


Vi söker en senior utvecklare med en stark drivkraft och hög leveransförmåga. Vi söker dig som har en bred teknisk kompetens och trivs i en roll där du får använda hela din verktygslåda oavsett om du är backend, front-end eller fullstack utvecklare.


Som utvecklare hos oss är du en nyckelspelare i att omvandla affärsbehov till hållbara tekniska lösningar som gör skillnad. Med din nyfikenhet, både för tekniken och för människorna omkring dig, skapar vi tillsammans lösningar som inte bara fungerar idag, utan också är framtidssäkrade.


Som person är du en lagspelare som uppskattar samarbete och ser värdet i att arbeta tätt tillsammans med andra för att skapa framgångsrika leveranser med fokus på kvalitet och affärsvärde. Du är nyfiken, initiativrik och engagerad i att skapa lösningar som bidrar till långsiktigt värde.

**Saker vi vet är viktiga för att lyckas**

* Flera års erfarenhet som utvecklare, med Microsoft som plattform och gärna med erfarenhet av molntjänster som Azure.
* Tidigare erfarenheter av att arbeta i team med agila metoder som Scrum och Kanban.
* Stark förmåga att kommunicera komplexa tekniska lösningar på ett tydligt och inspirerande sätt, både internt och externt.

**Teknik**


Vi vill gärna utforska och experimentera med nya tekniker för att möta framtidens behov med lösningar som gör skillnad och är framåtlutade. Våra utvecklare arbetar med en bred teknisk verktygslåda som kan variera beroende på kund och projekt.


Nedan följer några exempel på teknologier vi ofta använder:

* Utvecklingsspråk och ramverk: C#, .NET, JavaScript-ramverk som React och Vue.
* Molnplattformar: Främst Azure men även AWS.
* DevOps och CI/CD: Bygg- och leveranspipelines med fokus på automatisering.
* Containerteknologier: Docker och Kubernetes för skalbara och portabla lösningar.
* Databaser: Relationsdatabaser som Postgres, MS SQL samt NoSQL databaser.

**Vi erbjuder**

* En flexibel arbetsplats
* Konferenser – digitala, fysiska, interna och externa!
* Arbete i en mix av in-house leveranser och externa leveranser
* Kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling – i nya projekt, team och kunder
* Nära till beslut – dina idéer är värdefulla och de vill vi satsa på!

**Vilka blir dina Stretchkollegor?**


Vi har lite olika bakgrund, men gemensamt är att vi är problemlösare som trivs med komplicerade frågeställningar och utmaningar. Vi vet att mjukvara och produktutveckling är komplext och därför har vi lämnat förlegade arbetssätt bakom oss. Våra gemensamma värdeord är Nyfiken, Omtanke och Resultat – vilket vi exemplifierar i våra uppdrag hos kund såväl som internt.

**Om Stretchgruppen**


Vi tror på alla människors vilja och förmåga att utveckla en bättre värld. Och att vi har ett kollektivt ansvar att skapa hållbara lösningar, för en bättre framtid för oss och kommande generationer. Vi kallar det för hållbart entreprenörskap.


Våra bolag erbjuder IT-tjänster och produkter som skapar starkare och tydligare affärsvärde. Varje bolag har sin egen väldefinierade marknad där kundernas digitalisering står i centrum.


Läs mer oss och oss på Stretch Amplify AB
company_description: Stretch gör skillnad genom att ha affärsvärde i fokus, leveransförmåga i toppklass och entreprenörskap i vårt DNA. Dessutom har vi riktigt roligt när vi jobbar tillsammans. Följ med oss!

title: Embedded Software Developer - General Lighting
description:
LumenRadio is a high-tech company with the vision of replacing all cables in the world. We have been leading the wireless transformation within the lighting industry since 2008, where our technology is being used every day in the largest TV and Movie productions in Hollywood, at the Coachella festival, and the Eurovision Song Contest. Our patented technologies deliver unprecedented reliability for the most business-critical applications, and our products are now also used in permanent indoor and outdoor lighting installations, as well as in building automation systems.


Replacing cables in lighting control systems with wireless communication makes installations easier, more flexible and more cost-efficient. With rising demands for energy efficiency, wireless lighting control has become a key enabler, making intelligent control possible even where traditional cabling is not.


In our General Lighting team, we work with W-DALI and AirGlow to bring reliable wireless lighting control to real-world environments, using existing DALI systems and without the need for cabling. You will be part of our R&D organization, where we continuously develop and refine wireless communication technology, and are currently focused on building the next-generation platform that enables even higher performance in our wireless solutions.

**Your future**


We are looking for our next Embedded Software Developer to join our product development team within General Lighting. In this role, you will play an important role in new development projects as well as maintenance assignments on system level, e.g. drawing up requirement specifications, pre-studies, proposals, system design, system testing (QA) and acceptance testing. You will also plan and execute product/project plans and drive process improvements.


An important part of our approach to product development is having a deep understanding of our customers' challenges and closely understanding the environment in which our products are used. As a developer in the team, we expect you to be driven by a desire to understand the industry and participate in technical customer dialogues and support cases when needed. You will balance a deep technical interest and knowledge with the willingness to learn about domain specific requirements, standards, certifications etc.


As part of maintaining a close dialogue with our customers and partners, we expect you to participate in trade shows and engineering meet-ups around the world approximately 2-3 times per year.

**About you**

* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or equivalent
* Experience in delivering high-quality embedded C firmware
* Experience with Python, e.g. for testing purposes
* Experience in CI/CD and measuring electronics
* A genuine passion for technology, demonstrated by curiosity and a desire to stay informed about industry trends
* Fluency in English, written and spoken


While it's beneficial to have prior knowledge of, it's not essential as you'll have the opportunity to learn about:

* networking (IPv6, OSI model etc.)
* wireless networking (Bluetooth/BLE, Zigbee, WiFi, LoRa, Thread, 6LoWPAN, NB-IoT, 5G etc.)
* different lighting- & industry protocols, such as DALI, KNX, BACnet, Modbus, etc.

**Our tech stack**

* Whatever OS and editor that make you productive
* Arm-gcc, Git, GNU Make
* Robot Framework, GitLab and GitLab CI
* Bluetooth, SPI, UART, our own meshing network stack Mira


We are looking for people who share our values – Reliability, Innovation, Simplicity and Energy.

**Diversity and culture**


We are on a mission to replace all cables in the world, and we are looking for you who share our passion for cutting-edge technology! We value diversity and welcome different-minded professionals who are committed to our ambitious goals. We warmly welcome and encourage job applications from people of all backgrounds and genders.


If you need any adjustments to support you with your application, just let us know by emailing nelly.bertilsson@lumenradio.com.

**Our Benefits**

* We offer good job security through agreements and insurance, paid parental leave, holiday leave, and attractive pension plans
* Yearly health allowance - For your physical activity and well-being
* Yearly personal development allowance - For your brain and creativity
* Free access to the gym in the same building‍️
* Flexible working hours
* Not to mention our Coffee Club, Multipath Running Club, Crafts Club, and much more!

**More information**  

This is a full-time position at our Head Office in Gothenburg. In this position, you will report to Erik Abrahamsson, Engineering Manager, Lighting Control, and responsible recruiter is Nelly Bertilsson. Don't hesitate to reach out to nelly.bertilsson@lumenradio.com if you have any questions.


We kindly ask not to be contacted for external recruitment services for this recruitment process.

title: Business Developer Sweden
description:
### **Business Developer Sweden**


Are you an ambitious professional ready to develop your own region and build a market from the ground up? We are looking for a proactive and driven Business Developer to expand our presence in the Swedish market. If you enjoy creating your own success and making a tangible impact, keep reading.


At IXON, we connect machines with their builders. We are at the forefront of revolutionising the way machines are connected, monitored, and controlled. By providing an end-to-end solution consisting of our in-house developed IIoT cloud platform and connectivity hardware we empower machine builders with the tools and technology to stay future-proof and transform the way they do business. All with one goal: more efficient production with the lowest possible impact on the world.

 **This is what energises you**


As our new Business Developer Sweden, you will be responsible for the Västerås–Eskilstuna (Mälardalen) region. You will not just be maintaining an existing market; you will be given the autonomy to shape and expand your own territory.


Furthermore, we are expanding our Swedish team with two additional Business Developers. These colleagues will be working spread across other regions in Sweden, and you will meet up regularly to align strategies, share market insights, and collaborate closely.


On a daily basis, you will be involved in the following activities:

* **Market Development:** Actively identifying and developing new business opportunities with Swedish machine builders.
* **Full Sales Cycle:** Executing the entire sales process, from initial prospecting and contact to successfully closing deals.
* **Networking:** Building a strong and reliable network of prospects and industry connections.
* **Collaboration:** Working closely with Marketing, Sales Support, and Solution Engineers to deliver an excellent customer experience.
* **Strategy and Insights:** Providing market insights and feedback to continuously improve our go-to-market strategy in Sweden.

**This makes you successful**


You are entrepreneurial, curious, and ready to establish our brand in a newly entered region. You thrive on turning conversations into commercial success and appreciate working independently within an international, dynamic technology company.


In addition, it would be highly beneficial if you align with the following profile:

* 2–5 years of experience in a B2B commercial or business development role.
* Fluent in Swedish and English.
* Strong communication and relationship-building skills.
* Eagerness to learn and grow, combined with a practical, hands-on mentality.
* Affinity with industrial automation, cloud solutions, or mechanical engineering is a significant advantage.
* You are based in Sweden, specifically in or around the Västerås–Eskilstuna (Mälardalen) region, and you are willing to travel within your region by car to meet prospects.

 **Here’s what we offer you**


At IXON, you will join an international and dynamic environment, where you can make an immediate impact and grow rapidly. Together with your colleagues at home and abroad, you will contribute to the development of our innovative organisation. You get the opportunity to unlock your potential in a dynamic work environment where autonomy, a vibrant work culture, personal growth and meaningful contributions in industrial automation awaits you. Of course, we reward your dedication with a competitive salary and excellent secondary benefits, including:

 **Ready to dive in?**


Start your journey and connect with IXON. Applying is straightforward; please click the button below to submit your application.

*Need more details? Reach out to our recruiter, Joey van Elsen, by calling +31628819109 or send an email to careers@ixon.cloud.*

*(Agency interest in this vacancy is not desired.)*

 *Agency interest in this vacancy is not desired.*

title: Software Engineer
description:
**About Acast**
 Since 2014, Acast has been building the world’s most valuable podcast marketplace, creating the technology that connects podcast creators, advertisers, and listeners. Its marketplace spans more than 140,000 podcasts, 3,300 advertisers, and one billion quarterly listens. Crucially, those listens are monetized wherever they happen—across any podcast app or listening platform.
   

  

**About The Role**
 In just a few seconds, Acast’s Dynamic Ad Insertion platform dynamically sources, selects, and splices ads into uniquely personalised streams for millions of listens every day, all while optimising towards the best possible return for the creator, advertiser, and of course the listener themselves.
   

  

 As a Software Engineer in Delivery, you’ll be working in the team that owns Acast’s audience indexing and contextual targeting capabilities to ensure the right ad gets served to the right audience, on the right podcast. You’ll also work on Ad Manager, our internal campaign booking system, where sales and operations teams plan campaigns, configure targeting, and manage flights and creatives end to end. That means building and improving the tools that turn audience and content signals into bookable inventory — from how campaigns are set up and targeted, to how they stay in sync with delivery and reporting downstream.
   

  

 Your daily responsibilities are centered around development of our ad manager and targeting capabilities. You will collaborate with a team of data and software engineers, an Engineering Manager and a Product Manager, to plan and execute on innovative solutions that have a significant impact on our business.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
 You will work in an experienced team that is distributed across Europe.
   

  

 In collaboration with your team you will maintain and develop targeting capabilities, while also communicating and collaborating with peer teams and both internal and external stakeholders.
   

  

 While the campaign booking system is the team's primary focus, you’ll also be working on our audience indexing and targeting capabilities .
   

  

 The team owns critical services as part of Acast’s Ad Delivery pipeline , and you will be expected to join the rotation providing 24 hour on-call support for this.
   

  

**Who You Are**
 We believe you are a software engineer who’s early in their career, with a focus on front-end development but have an interest for the full stack. You enjoy solving problems and seek to understand the business needs around the things you build and support. You’re able to work alone or as a pair, and believe direct collaboration is the best way to solve problems. You believe AI is here to accelerate us and use it in your day-to-day work.
   

  

 You are creatively solving problems using Node, TypeScript and React, or similar.
   

  

 You are comfortable with or willing to learn AWS and understand the value of healthy CI/CD pipelines.
   

  

**Location**
 Most of our teams are hybrids with some members co-located in offices and some working fully remote. With a remote first way of working we want you to feel productive regardless of work location.
   

  

 For this role, you can be based in the UK or Sweden. We have offices in London and Stockholm but it is optional if you want to work remote or at the office.
   

  

**Culture**
 Acast is committed to creating a diverse environment and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment regardless of race, gender, sexual orientation, religion, ethnicity, national origin or any of the other wonderful characteristics that make us different.
   

  

 Culture is our number one priority as a business. We believe people come first, and we work every day to enable autonomy, continuous improvement and bring out the best in people. We’re global and have remote teams, so it’s even more important that we strive for an open, inclusive and caring environment where everyone feels visible and welcome.
   

  

 We consider ourselves a modern organization driven by strong values to create the best, most fulfilling and nurturing culture.
   

  

 We very much look forward to finding the next great person to join our cause!

title: Software Engineer/ Senior Frontend Engineer
description:
We are looking for a senior frontend engineer with deep experience in payment flows and enterprise applications. In this role, you will take full ownership of complex features from design to production, set the technical standard for the team, and help build a scalable and secure frontend platform in one of the most demanding domains in digital commerce.
 



  





 You will work in a modern stack with Next.js, React and TypeScript, lead architectural decisions and act as a natural mentor for other engineers. You are comfortable stepping into the BFF layer or Node.js services when needed, and you understand that robust frontend in payment environments requires as much security thinking as technical skill.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Own end-to-end delivery of complex frontend features from requirements to production
* Design scalable, maintainable architecture (modularisation, code splitting, performance)
* Lead state management strategy (Redux, Zustand, React Query) and ensure predictable data flow
* Build and integrate with APIs and BFF layers; contribute to Node.js services where needed
* Deliver accessible, responsive UIs (WCAG-compliant, semantic HTML, CSS)
* Drive performance optimisation, rendering, bundle size, network usage, caching
* Establish and enforce coding standards and best practices across the codebase
* Conduct code reviews and mentor other engineers
* Embed security best practices into development, particularly around payment flows and authentication
* Contribute to CI/CD pipelines and testing strategies (unit, integration, e2e)
* Actively participate in Agile ceremonies and deliver iteratively



  





**Qualifications** 



* Strong experience in the payments domain, particularly checkout flows
* Deep expertise in Next.js, React and TypeScript
* Experience with backend development or debugging against backend services
* Strong communication skills in English, written and spoken
* Self-driven with the ability to lead technical initiatives and raise the bar for the team



  





**Nice to have** 



* Experience with large-scale enterprise applications
* Familiarity with observability tools and structured production debugging
* Experience with security work in regulated environments (PCI-DSS, authentication flows, data protection)



  





**Location** 




 Stockholm preferred
 



  





**About Astek Sweden** 




 Astek has always been driven by a strong curiosity and a passion for the possibilities of technology. This fascination is the foundation of everything we do — our commitment to innovation and product development, the long-term client relationships we build, and the value we create in every assignment, every day. With us, you get the opportunity to grow alongside some of the most skilled engineers and technical experts in the industry.
 



  





**What we offer** 




 We are a company where innovation, community and development are at the heart of what we do. With us, you get the opportunity to work on exciting and challenging projects in an environment where your skills and ideas are valued. We offer:
 


* An inspiring workplace where technology and creativity meet.
* The opportunity to work with leading players in the industry.
* Competence development and career opportunities.
* A company culture where we have fun together and support each other!
* Great benefits including SEK 5,000 in wellness allowance.



  





 We encourage all engineers to apply regardless of gender, background or life situation.
 



  





 Want to be part of our team? You are warmly welcome to submit your application.
 



 We recruit on a rolling basis. Don't hesitate with your application and feel free to contact us if you have any questions.

title: Back End Developer
description:
**Backend Engineer (Data)** 




  





 We're looking for a Backend Engineer to help build scalable services and data platforms that turn large volumes of telemetry and operational data into actionable insights.
 



 Working within a small, high-performing engineering team, you'll develop backend services, data pipelines, and internal tools that enable teams across the business to better understand and utilise data.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Build and maintain backend services, APIs, and data applications.
* Develop and improve data pipelines and reporting capabilities.
* Contribute to AI-powered and data-driven tooling.
* Improve automation, scalability, reliability, and deployment processes.
* Collaborate closely with product and engineering teams.



  





**Requirements** 



* Strong backend development experience with Python and/or Go.
* Experience building cloud-based distributed systems.
* Knowledge of data pipelines, data warehousing, and large-scale datasets.
* Familiarity with Kubernetes, Terraform, and modern DevOps practices.
* Strong communication skills and professional English.



  





**What's on Offer** 



* Modern technology stack.
* High levels of ownership and autonomy.
* Collaborative engineering culture.
* Competitive salary and benefits.

title: Staff .NET Developer
description:
**What will you do?**
 As a Staff .NET Developer at Rebtel you will serve as the technical guardian and principal individual contributor for the entire Backend (BE) architecture and ecosystem. This role is crucial for ensuring the technical excellence, scalability, reliability, and security of all backend systems that power our core products and services. The Staff Software Engineer will operate at a high level of abstraction, influencing engineering practices across multiple teams while remaining hands-on in critical areas.
   

  

 You’ll be actively involved in architectural decisions, contribute to technical discussions, and inspire your team to deliver clean, robust code.
   

  

**Responsibilities And Tasks**
* Lead the design, development, and deployment of complex, high-throughput backend services and APIs, ensuring best-in-class performance and maintainability.
* Drive architectural decisions and serve as the ultimate technical escalation point for BE-related challenges.
* Establish and articulate a clear, ambitious long-term vision and technical roadmap for the evolution of the BE systems.
* This includes planning for future growth, anticipating technological shifts, and driving the adoption of new technologies and patterns to maintain a competitive edge.
* Act as the primary architect for major system initiatives, defining microservices boundaries, data models, integration patterns, and deployment strategies.
* Proactively identify and resolve technical debt and architectural risks before they impact the business.
* Mentor engineers, elevating the technical expertise and quality of engineering output across the organization.
* Influence engineering standards and best practices for testing, performance tuning, and security across different development teams.


**Requirements**
* Exceptional and proven proficiency in the .NET area, including extensive experience with C#, .NET Core/8+, and related frameworks (e.g., ASP. NET Core, Entity Framework Core).
* Must demonstrate the ability to architect and build high-performance, fault-tolerant systems using the .NET stack.
* Demonstrable architecting skills with a strong background in designing and implementing large-scale, distributed systems (e.g., microservices, event-driven architectures, serverless).
* Expert knowledge of design patterns, domain-driven design (DDD), and SOLID principles.
* Extensive experience with at least one major cloud platform (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and related services (e.g., managed databases, message queues, containerization).
* Deep understanding of various database technologies (SQL and NoSQL) and data modeling best practices for scalable applications.
* System-Level Thinking: Ability to decompose complex problems into manageable components and evaluate trade-offs between different technical solutions (e.g., speed vs. stability, buy vs. build).
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to present complex technical ideas clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders, driving consensus on critical architectural decisions.


**Why Rebtel?**
 Rebtel has been connecting people across borders for nearly 20 years. Today, we’re profitable, growing, and at a pivotal moment in our journey. As we enter our next phase, we’re building an organisation designed for speed, ownership, and real impact, where every role contributes directly to shaping what comes next.
   

  

 This is a place with global ambition and a strong foundation, where ideas move quickly and decisions matter. You won’t get lost in layers of process or slow-moving structures. Instead, you’ll find the space to take ownership, collaborate across teams, and make meaningful contributions from day one. Based in Stockholm, we bring together a diverse, international team united by a shared purpose: to simplify the way people connect worldwide.
   

  

**Benefits**
 At Rebtel, you are the most important asset and we strive to provide a comprehensive package of benefits and perks that enhance your well-being and work experience. Here are some of the things you can expect from us:
   

  

* Pension Plan
* Health Checkups, Influenza shots and Private Medical Insurance
* Dental Insurance
* Occupational insurance
* Wellness allowance (5,000 SEK)
* Discount on gym memberships
* Bonus program
* Extra parental pay
* 30 days annual vacation
* Monday breakfasts
* Relocation Support, if you're joining us from afar, we'll assist you in making a smooth transition.


*We are Rebtel. We come from all around the world to create products for anyone who has crossed a border. We believe in equal opportunity and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.*
 Rebtel is a company of about 70 people from 31 countries who share a common mission to empower diaspora communities around the world to stay connected to where they come from. From our office in central Stockholm, we help our user base of 1 million dual-culture people—predominantly from the global south—connect with and support their communities through affordable data-free international calling and mobile top-ups. With our app and online platform, we help dissolve the space between their worlds so they can live more connected lives.

title: Java Developer
description:

title: Software Engineer
description:
**Software Developer – Trading Systems**
 As a Software Developer, you'll play a critical role in building and maintaining one of Nasdaq’s core systems powering trading at the heart of Nasdaq Stockholm.
   

  

 You'll thrive in this position if you're detail-oriented, collaborative, and passionate about working on complex systems where precision and reliability are paramount. This is a long-term opportunity to grow deep expertise in financial technology alongside a stable, experienced team.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Participate in all phases of the lifecycle of software application development with an emphasis on architecture, design, quality, code reviews and implementation
* Develop and maintain backend systems that process real-time equity trades with ultra-low latency requirements.
* Write clean, well-tested code and conduct thorough code reviews to ensure system reliability and quality.
* Collaborate with a small, focused team of developers to deliver enhancements to critical trading infrastructure.
* Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues using data analysis, scripting, and network diagnostics.
* Contribute to system architecture decisions with a focus on scalability, maintainability, and performance.


**Required Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 2–3+ years of experience in software development, ideally in backend or systems programming.
* Proficiency in Java and object-oriented programming principles and design patterns.
* Solid understanding of Linux/Unix environments
* Excellent attention to detail and a structured approach to problem-solving in high-stakes environments.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Understanding of network protocols and ability to analyze network traffic (e.g., tcpdumps).
* Background in financial services, capital markets, or fintech.


 This position will be located in Stockholm and offers the opportunity for a hybrid work environment at least 3 days a week in-office, subject to change, providing flexibility and accessibility for qualified candidates.
   

  

**Come as You Are**
 Nasdaq is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds and identities. We are committed to fostering an inclusive workplace where diverse perspectives, experiences, and identities are valued and celebrated. We ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided with reasonable accommodation throughout the hiring process. To request accommodation, contact us directly.
   

  

**Benefits & Rewards**
 We offer a competitive, well-rounded rewards package that supports you and your family - inside and outside work.
   

  

 Actual pay depends on your skills, experience, education, and location. In addition to base pay, we offer short-term incentives (bonus or commission) and long-term incentives (equity), where applicable, as well as the following benefits:
   

  

**What We Offer**
* Competitive base salary
* Annual bonus
* Annual equity grant
* Employee Stock Purchase Plan offering discounted company shares
* Pension plan
* 32 paid vacation days
* 6 additional days off per year
* Work from (almost) anywhere – up to 20 days/year
* Paid time off to volunteer
* Health insurance
* Friskvårdsbidrag/Wellness Allowance
* 24/7 mental health support for you and your family
* Global mentoring program
* Unlimited access to e-learning platforms
* Hybrid work setup


 For more information, visit Nasdaq Benefits & Rewards Career Page.
   

  

**Come as You Are**
 Nasdaq is an equal opportunity employer. We positively encourage applications from suitably qualified and eligible candidates regardless of age, color, disability, national origin, ancestry, race, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity and/or expression, veteran status, genetic information, or any other status protected by applicable law.
   

  

 We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment. Please contact us to request an accommodation.

title: Game Developer (backend)
description:
**About Us**
 Hacksaw Studios is a Stockholm-based game studio focused on creating innovative, high-quality gaming experiences. With a focus on performance and precision, we bring ideas to life through technical expertise and creative collaboration. We have wide distribution, and our games are played by millions of people every month by players all over the world.
   

  

 We are currently seeking to expand our development team with additional developers and are looking for both junior and senior candidates. You will be part of our game development team and work in a tight-knit team involving both back-end developers and designers.
   

  

 The Role
   

  

 As a Game Developer at Hacksaw Studios, you’ll play a key role in transforming game concepts into high-performing experiences. Your task will be to bring our game ideas to life in co-operation with the designers and product owners.
   

  

**Your Key Responsibilities Include**
* Working with the development and design team to implement the backend gameplay mechanics behind our various games.
* Working with the front-end development team to ensure the backend communications protocols make their work as simple as possible.
* Working with the game design team to implement their game ideas.
* Implementing the mathematical model underlying the games.
* Performing statistical modeling and testing to ensure the games behave as intended (We'll teach you this part).
* Learning about the online gaming industry and staying up to date on current trends and what is popular with players.
* Participating in code reviews and merge requests.
* Co-operating with colleagues with similar roles, both in-house and with our partners.


**What We’re Looking For**
 You value clean code, smart solutions, and the impact your work has behind the scenes.
   

  

**You Bring**
* A solid backend development background.
* Experience with a programming language suited for game development, such as C#, Java or C++ (We use C#).
* A high interest in or education in mathematics or statistics.


**Nice-to-have**
* Experience with unit testing.
* University degree in a related field.
* A personal interest in gaming.


 What We Offer
   

  

* A modern office in central Stockholm.
* Work with experienced, passionate colleagues in the gaming industry.
* The opportunity to create games with a global audience.
* Real influence, ownership, and personal growth opportunities.
* Wellbeing perks including wellness allowance.


 Practical Details
   

  

* This is an on-site position in Stockholm.
* Unfortunately, we cannot assist with relocation or visa sponsorship.


 Ready to Join the Game Makers?
   

  

 Apply now! We review applications on a rolling basis.

title: Fullstack Engineer - Lovable Apps Platform Team
description:
**About Lovable & Lovable Apps Platform**
 Lovable is an AI-powered software creation platform. Millions of users use Lovable to go from idea to working application, generating hundreds of thousands of apps every day.
   

  

 The Lovable Apps Platform is what makes those generated apps actually run in production. The moment a user hits deploy, the Apps Platform takes over — provisioning the database, handling user auth, storing files, serving the app over a custom domain, capturing logs, and metering usage. It's the full backend and hosting layer for every app built on Lovable, designed so creators never have to think about infrastructure to ship something real.
   

  

 The Lovable Apps Platform is what makes those generated apps actually run in production. The moment a user hits deploy, the Apps Platform takes over — provisioning the database, handling user auth, storing files, serving the app over a custom domain, capturing logs, and metering usage. It's the full backend and hosting layer for every app built on Lovable, designed so creators never have to think about infrastructure to ship something real.
   

  

 The Apps Platform is growing fast, and we're investing heavily in each layer of the stack — building deeper ownership over the services that power our users' apps so we can move faster, scale better, and shape the product experience us and our users actually want.
   

  

**The Role**
 We're looking for product-minded fullstack engineers who can own end-to-end slices of our Lovable Apps Platform. You'll build the interfaces, APIs, and integrations that let Lovable users manage their cloud resources — from admin panels and analytics dashboards to vendor abstraction layers and the AI gateway. This is the highest-surface-area layer of the stack: identity, logging, metering, workflow engine, buckets, database connection strings, secrets, custom domains, and connectors.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Create UX for our users to build with Apps Platform features
* Build and own platform services like identity, logging, metering, workflow engine, object storage, secrets
* Create abstraction layers for deep integrations with key partners and vendors


**What We're Looking For**
* Strong fullstack background: deep comfort with TypeScript/React on the frontend and Node.js or similar on the backend
* Experience building and operating SaaS platform features — auth flows, metering/billing pipelines, API gateways, or developer tooling
* Product instinct: you think in user outcomes, not just API endpoints
* Comfort working with third-party services and building clean abstractions over vendor APIs Familiarity with managed cloud services (AWS, GCP) and the tradeoffs of buy-vs-build
* Experience with observability, logging, or metering systems is a strong plus
* You've shipped features in fast-moving, high-ownership environments where you wore multiple hats
* Experience with DNS, TLS/SSL automation, and custom domain provisioning at scale


**Nice to Have**
* Experience with BaaS or PaaS platforms (Supabase, Firebase, Vercel, Render, etc.)
* Familiarity with TanStack Router/Query or similar modern frontend stacks
* Background in developer experience or developer tools
* Interest in AI-assisted development and how cloud infrastructure enables it


**Our tech stack**
 We're building with tools that both humans and AI love. Lovable software engineers are capable of working across the whole stack. Examples of tech in our stack include:
   

  

* Frontend: React and Typescript.
* Backend: Golang and Rust.
* Cloud: Cloudflare, GCP, AWS, Modal.
* Data: Clickhouse, Firestore, Spanner, BigQuery.
* DevOps & Tooling: CI/CD pipelines, OTEL, Kubernetes, Terraform.


 And always on the lookout for what's next!
   

  

**About Your Application**
* Please submit your application in English - it’s our company language so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join
* We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested please apply through our careers portal

title: Embedded System Software Engineer
description:

 Vill du arbeta med avancerade inbyggda system och vara med och utveckla framtidens produkter?  Fokus för verksamheten är att erbjuda våra kunder en komplett produktutvecklingsförmåga. Vårt dagliga arbete präglas av struktur och leveransfokus för att säkerställa högsta kvalitet i allt vi gör. Kvalificerade medarbetare är vår största tillgång, och de flesta av oss är civilingenjörer med lång yrkeserfarenhet.
