title: Service designer - Network visibility
description:
Overview:
**SERVICE DESIGNER**  

Join us in transforming global logistics. At Wallenius Wilhelmsen, we don’t just move cargo; we move the world. As the market leader in roll-on/roll-off (RoRo) shipping and vehicle logistics, we manage the global distribution of cars, trucks, and heavy equipment across six continents. With 125 vessels, 66 processing centers, and 8 marine terminals, we are reimagining how global logistics can be smarter, greener, and more connected.


We’re on a mission to lead the green transition in logistics and aim to be carbon neutral by 2040. Join our transformation journey and help shape the future of digital supply chain solutions.x

 **About the role**

  

We are looking for an experienced Service Designer for Network Visibility (NV) who will shape how our logistics network operates end-to-end across systems, processes, and user interactions.


This is not a traditional UX/Product Designer role. You will work deeply with business processes, operational workflows, and data flows, ensuring that Network Visibility solutions are not only user-friendly but also operationally effective, scalable, and aligned to business objectives.

  

You will act as a bridge between business, operations, and technology teams, translating complex logistics workflows into clear, structured, and efficient service designs.

  


Job Description: **What is Network Visibility?**  

Network Visibility refers to the real-time understanding and tracking of the movement of assets (e.g., vessels, cargo, shipments) across the logistics network.

  

It involves:

* Monitoring vessel inflow and outflow
* Tracking cargo status and location across ports and systems
* Providing end-to-end transparency across planning, operations, and execution
* Enabling better decision-making through accurate, timely data

The goal of Network Visibility is to ensure that all stakeholders (operations, planning, customers) have a consistent, reliable, and actionable view of the network

 **WHAT YOU'LL DO**  

Business Process Mapping & Optimization:  

* Lead as-is and to-be process mapping for key logistics workflows.
* Identify inefficiencies, gaps, and dependency risks in processes. Ability to challenge business assumptions and drive clarity.
* Ensure clarity on scope, dependencies, and expected outcomes

Cross-Functional Alignment:* Align stakeholders on Process flows, Scope and boundaries, Expected outcomes, Acting as a translator between technical teams and business users

  

Data-Driven Design & Continuous Improvement:

* Use qualitative and quantitative data to inform design decisions


Job Requirements:
**WHAT YOU'LL NEED**  

* You think beyond screens and features, and focus on designing complete services and business workflows
* You are comfortable working in complex operational environments, where multiple systems, teams, and processes interact
* You can bring structure to ambiguity and translate unclear business needs into clear, actionable designs
* You have a strong ability to connect business goals with user experience and system capabilities
* You are confident facilitating workshops and discussions to align stakeholders across business and technology
* You are naturally curious about how things work end-to-end, not just within a single system or team
* You are detail-oriented and ensure clarity, consistency, and completeness in process and requirement definitions
* You are comfortable challenging assumptions and driving alignment across diverse stakeholders

 **Must Have**

* Proven experience in:



	+ Service Design
	+ Business Analysis
	+ Business Process Mapping / Optimization
* Strong hands-on experience with:



	+ End-to-end process mapping (as-is / to-be)
	+ Service blueprints and journey mapping
	+ Translating workflows into structured diagrams (e.g., BPMN, swimlanes)
* Ability to:



	+ Break down complex workflows into clear, structured processes
	+ Define functional and business requirements
	+ Ensure alignment between business needs, backlog, and delivered solutions
* Experience working in:



	+ Cross-functional Agile teams
	+ Environments with multiple stakeholders (business, product, tech)
* Strong stakeholder engagement skills:



	+ Able to facilitate workshops
	+ Manage differing viewpoints and drive towards clear decisions
 **Highly Relevant**

* Experience working in logistics, shipping, supply chain, or operational platforms
* Exposure to Digital Twins, tracking systems, or operational dashboards
  

* Understanding of:
* + Data flows across systems
* + Integration dependencies
* Experience with:
* + Azure DevOps (or similar backlog tools
* + Figma, Miro ,Visio, Lucidchart (process/design tools)
 **Why This Role is Different**

  

This is not just a UX/Product Designer role.

  

You will:

* Work deeply with business processes, not just interfaces
* Shape how services function behind the scenes, not just how they look
* Play a hybrid role across service design, business analysis, and transformation
 **WHEN YOU JOIN US**
At Wallenius Wilhelmsen, we prioritize your well-being. Our industry-leading benefits and perks are designed to help you thrive in your career and your life outside of work. From affordable healthcare to well-being, we’ve got you covered.  

* Choose from a range of low-cost health insurance options to support your well-being including medical, dental and vision after 30 days of employment
* Secure your financial future with an industry-leading company-matching 401(k) plan
* Company paid life insurance, short-term and long-term disability
* Explore career development with access to on-the-job training
* Access to exclusive discounts on attractions, automotive, travel and more!

 **WORKING CONDITIONS**  

Environmental conditions vary by location, including indoor and outdoor settings. Employees may encounter extreme temperatures, wetness, wind, fumes, dust particles and drafts. Safety is our top priority, and we are dedicated to fostering a safety-first environment, ensuring all precautions are taken to protect our team in every working condition.  

**ABOUT US****Wallenius Wilhelmsen** is the global leader in integrated vehicle transportation and logistics, supporting our customers across their supply chain, all the way from the factory to the end-customer. Our ambition is to lead the way in transforming shipping and logistics.  

We transport and handle cars, tractors, trains, windmills, or even whole factories for some of the most well-known companies in the world. Our eyes will always be on delivering supreme quality in everything we do, while moving towards zero-emission logistics. We are powered by nearly 9,500+ people, working on vessels and at ports, at vehicle and equipment processing centers in 28 countries. Together, we are building resilient, connected, data-driven, decarbonized solutions fit for the future.  

**OUR COMMITMENT TO EQUAL OPPORTUNITIES**
We are a global group of people from diverse backgrounds and lifestyles. Wallenius Wilhelmsen is proud to be an equal opportunity employer committed to building a workplace where all contributors feel they can bring their best selves every day, learn from each other, and be appreciated. Our journey towards sustainable and integrated logistics compels us to attract people with diverse experiences, skills, and abilities.  

Apply today, and let’s keep the world and your career, moving together.  


Pay Type : Salary
company_description: Sustainable logistics for a world in motion. We are Wallenius Wilhelmsen, a global market leader in sustainable logistics for over 100 years.

title: Senior Software Engineer, Windows/Desktop Applications - Stockholm, Sweden
description:
**Mission**

The mission of Speechify is to make sure that reading is never a barrier to learning.



Over 50 million people use Speechify's text-to-speech products to turn whatever they're reading – PDFs, books, Google Docs, news articles, websites – into audio, so they can read faster, read more, and remember more. Speechify's text-to-speech reading products include its iOS app, Android App, Mac App, Chrome Extension, and Web App. Google recently named Speechify the Chrome Extension of the Year and Apple named Speechify its 2025 Design Award winner for Inclusivity.


Today, nearly 200 people around the globe work on Speechify in a 100% distributed setting – Speechify has no office. These include frontend and backend engineers, AI research scientists, and others from Amazon, Microsoft, and Google, leading PhD programs like Stanford, high growth startups like Stripe, Vercel, Bolt, and many founders of their own companies



**What You'll Do**
* Lead the design, architecture, and development of native Windows desktop applications using Windows App SDK, WinUI (or related UI frameworks), C#, XAML, and — when needed — C++.
* Define and enforce best-practices for Windows desktop development across the codebase: code architecture, performance, memory usage, responsive UI, cross-version compatibility (Windows 10/11+), and maintainability.
* Drive accessibility efforts: integrate and validate support for accessibility APIs (e.g. Microsoft UI Automation or other relevant Windows accessibility frameworks), ensure UI controls, focus management, keyboard navigation, screen-reader support, and usability for users with disabilities.
* Collaborate closely with product designers, UX researchers, QA, and other stakeholders to shape feature planning, UI/UX architecture, and long-term roadmap for the Windows platform.
* Take ownership of full lifecycle of features: conception design implementation testing release maintenance. Ensure quality, reliability, and consistency across releases.
* Identify, diagnose, and resolve complex bugs, performance bottlenecks, memory leaks, rendering issues, or compatibility problems — and propose robust architectural or design solutions.


**An ideal candidate should have**
**Required:**


* 3+ in Windows desktop application development using Windows App SDK, WinUI (or similar), C#, XAML — and ideally additional experience with native Windows code (C++, Win32/WinRT/COM).
* Deep understanding of Windows application architecture, including interop between managed code (.NET) and native code.
* Proven track record of designing, building, and shipping production-quality desktop applications, with an emphasis on reliability, performance, scalability, and maintainability.
* Strong experience with accessibility APIs on Windows (e.g. Microsoft UI Automation or similar), and a dedication to building accessible and inclusive software.
* Excellent software engineering fundamentals: OOP, design patterns, data structures, algorithms, memory management, multi-threading or asynchronous programming (where relevant).
* Experience leading technical design, mentoring other engineers, conducting code reviews, and making architecture-level decisions.
* Strong communication skills; ability to articulate tradeoffs, collaborate with cross-functional teams, and drive consensus.
* A user-centric mindset: focus on building polished, intuitive, and accessible experiences for end users.


**Preferred / Bonus:**


* Experience with writing automated tests for UI — unit tests, integration tests, UI automation tests; familiarity with relevant testing frameworks.
* Experience with performance optimization for desktop apps (memory usage, startup time, rendering performance, high-DPI support, responsiveness under load).
* Experience with localization/globalization, right-to-left UI support, internationalization, accessibility for multiple regions.
* Familiarity with telemetry, analytics, crash reporting, logging, and error monitoring in desktop applications.
* Previous experience in shaping CI/CD workflows, release pipelines, and deployment strategies for desktop applications.
* Demonstrated ability to take ownership of feature areas or modules and drive them long-term, including maintenance, refactoring, and technical debt management.


**What we offer**


* A high-impact role: you will define architecture, shape the future of our Windows product, and directly influence what millions of users see and experience.
* A collaborative, flat-structure engineering culture — you are not just a coder, but a builder and a decision-maker.
* Opportunities to lead — mentor others, steer technical direction, and grow into broader technical leadership (e.g. Tech Lead, Architect).
* Flexibility, autonomy, and responsibility: you define how to solve problems, own features end-to-end, and contribute to long-term product vision.
* A purpose-driven mission: building software that's reliable, accessible, and user-centered — making a real difference for people.

**The Sweden Based** Salary range for this role is: 30,000-115,000 USD/Year + Bonus + Stock depending on experience.


**Think you're a good fit for this job?**



Tell us more about yourself and why you're interested in the role when you apply.  

And don't forget to include links to your portfolio and LinkedIn.


**Not looking but know someone who would make a great fit?**  

Refer them!


**Speechify is committed to a diverse and inclusive workplace.**  

Speechify does not discriminate on the basis of race, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, age, or other legally protected status.

title: Senior Software Engineer - Frontend Focus
description:
Are you passionate about creating world-class user experiences? NOBA is now seeking for a frontend focused software engineer with a love for modern web solutions to join our team in Stockholm. About the role: As a frontend developer at NOBA, you will play a key role in shaping user-friendly and accessible web applications that have a real impact on both our internal teams and external users. You’ll take significant responsibility for driving frontend projects from design and architecture to release, ensuring that every interface is intuitive, responsive, and of the highest quality.
  
Your day-to-day work will involve developing and enhancing web applications using React, building seamless and engaging user experiences, and maintaining high standards of code quality. While you’ll focus on frontend, you’ll also collaborate closely with backend developers to integrate APIs and services, making sure the entire application functions smoothly as a whole. This collaboration is central to our workflow, and at times, you may even contribute to backend tasks to ensure the best possible integration and user experience.
  
You’ll be part of an Agile team, participating in the full development process and working together with UX/UI designers and backend engineers to deliver solutions that truly make a difference.
  
We work from the office 2 days per week.
  
  

**We're looking for someone who:**  

Has 5+ years of software development experience, with an emphasis on frontend
  
  

Has driven features end-to-end and contributed to frontend technical decisions
  
  

Has a deep understanding of React fundamentals
  
  

Has strong CSS skills, and a good eye for visual detail
  
  

Has a good understanding of WCAG
  
  

Can write backend APIs when required, ensuring smooth integration with frontend features
  
  

Is a team player who enjoys sharing knowledge
  
  

Is fluent in English, both spoken and written
  
  

**Bonus points for:**  

Experience in Next.js and/or building React apps
  
  

Experience in frontend testing using Vitest/Jest and Playwright
  
  

Experience in backend development in .Net
  
In addition to this, it is important to us that you recognize yourself in our values: we are wholehearted, we collaborate and we take the lead.
  
  

Have you heard of NOBAVERSE?
  
In our NOBAVERSE, we value openness, trust, and diversity. Here, you can influence your own development and have fun along the way to achieving our goals – all in a workplace that’s a little extra bubbly! ✨ Read more about our employee value proposition on our careers page.
  
Read more about how our recruitment process works in the FAQ.
  
We care for your privacy and, with reference to the GDPR, would like to ask you not to include any sensitive personal data in your application, for examples information about ethnic origin, political opinions, religious beliefs or information about your health.
  
Read more about how we handle your personal data here.
  
If you have any questions or concerns about the position, please contact the responsible recruiter.
  
We look forward to receiving your application! ✨
  
  

#NOBAFindersFee

title: Senior Automotive UX Designer – Göteborg 🚗
description:
Om uppdraget
  
Vi söker en senior UX Designer till ett innovativt designteam i Göteborg. I rollen kommer du att designa och utveckla användarupplevelser för framtidens fordonslösningar, med fokus på digitala gränssnitt för centrala displayer och mobila applikationer.
  
Du blir en del av en verksamhet där design och teknik möts för att skapa intuitiva, visuellt tilltalande och användarcentrerade lösningar. Rollen innebär nära samarbete med designers, ingenjörer och produktteam genom hela utvecklingsprocessen.
  
Dina arbetsuppgifter ️
  
Designa och optimera användargränssnitt för fordonsrelaterade system, inklusive centrala displayer och mobilapplikationer
  
  

Skapa interaktiva prototyper för att utforska och kommunicera nya UX-koncept och interaktionsmönster
  
  

Analysera användarbeteenden och användarfeedback för att förbättra användarupplevelsen
  
  

Samarbeta med utvecklingsteam, produktägare och andra intressenter för att säkerställa hög kvalitet i designlösningarna
  
  

Säkerställa en konsekvent designupplevelse genom hela produktens gränssnitt
  
  

Ta fram designspecifikationer och dokumentation för utvecklingsteam
  
  

Bidra till utvecklingen av designprocesser, metoder och arbetssätt
  
  

Förväntade leveranser
  
Användarcentrerade UX- och UI-lösningar för fordonsmiljöer
  
  

Interaktiva prototyper och konceptvisualiseringar
  
  

Dokumenterade designunderlag för utveckling och implementation
  
  

Förbättrade användarflöden baserade på analyser och användarinsikter
  
  

Designlösningar som balanserar användarbehov, tekniska krav och affärsmål
  
  

Din profil Obligatoriska kompetenser
  
Kandidatexamen eller högre inom design med inriktning UX, interaktionsdesign eller motsvarande
  
  

Minst 5 års erfarenhet av UX-design inom fordonsindustrin eller närliggande områden
  
  

Dokumenterad erfarenhet av design för touchbaserade plattformar såsom mobilappar
  
  

Stark förståelse för UI/UX-principer, ikonografi, skärmlayouter och systeminteraktioner
  
  

Erfarenhet av användartester, UX-analyser och arbete med användarfeedback
  
  

Erfarenhet av att samarbeta nära både designers och ingenjörer
  
  

Mycket god kunskap i Figma, After Effects, Photoshop och Illustrator
  
  

Mycket god förståelse för visuell design, typografi, färglära och layout
  
  

Flytande engelska i tal och skrift
  
  

Meriterande färdigheter
  
Erfarenhet av fordonsrelaterade HMI-lösningar
  
  

Erfarenhet av att utveckla koncept till produktionsbara lösningar tillsammans med leverantörer och ingenjörsteam
  
  

Erfarenhet av prototypframtagning för komplexa digitala produkter
  
  

Erfarenhet av arbete i internationella och tvärfunktionella miljöer
  
  

Personliga egenskaper ⭐
  
Självständig och initiativtagande
  
  

Analytisk och strukturerad
  
  

Stark kommunikativ förmåga
  
  

God samarbetsförmåga
  
  

Flexibel och anpassningsbar i föränderliga miljöer
  
  

Hög ansvarskänsla och förmåga att driva arbete framåt
  
  

**Plats:** Göteborg
  
**⏳ Omfattning:** Heltid, 40 timmar/vecka
  
**Period:** 2026-06-26 – 2026-12-31
  
**Arbetsmodell:** Kontorsbaserad med viss möjlighet till distansarbete
  
**✈️ Resor:** Resor till Kina kan förekomma, cirka 2–3 gånger per år
  
**️ Språk:** Flytande engelska i tal och skrift
  
**Möjlighet till förlängning:** Ja
  
**Sista ansökningsdag:** 2026-06-16
  
Sway Sourcing är en innovativ rekryteringspartner som specialiserar sig på att matcha rätt talang med rätt företag – snabbt och effektivt. Vårt huvudfokus ligger inom Ekonomi, Administration, HR, Marknad och IT, men vi har även den breda expertis och flexibilitet som krävs för att leverera skräddarsydda rekryteringslösningar inom alla branscher.
  
Trots att vi är en relativt ny aktör har vi redan byggt förtroende hos många av Sveriges största företag och arbetar både nationellt och internationellt. Med baser i Sverige och Spanien erbjuder vi en unik kombination av lokal expertis och global räckvidd. Vårt starka nätverk och djupa branschinsikter gör oss till en självklar partner för företag som vill ligga steget före i sin rekrytering.

title: Concept Artist
description:
Role Overview
  
As a concept artist on this unannounced project, you will help shape a new chapter in Paradox Interactives’ constantly growing catalogue of games. You’ll work closely with an Art Director, UX Designer, Programmers and Content Designer to create a variety of 2D assets from illustrations, UI Elements and concept art. This project is early in its development and you’ll have the opportunity to contribute with your own artistic style to it within the established direction to help shape it until full production.
  
  

Key Responsibilities
  
Visual Design & Implementation
  
Create high-quality UI elements, icons, portraits, illustrations, and other 2D assets.
  
Develop and establish aspects of the game's visual direction.
  
Implement and optimize UI assets in the game engine with a focus on readability and performance.
  
Find modular smart ways to approach upscaling down the line.
  
  

Collaboration & Iteration
  
Work closely with the Art Director to shape the 2D art language of the game.
  
Partner with UX Designers to ensure clear and player-friendly navigation in interface.
  
Work with Programmers to integrate UI features while maintaining design intent.
  
  

Creative Problem-Solving
  
Come up with your own takes to not-yet established elements while communicating with the team about requirements and direction.
  
Help establish a visual language that demands readability and quality.
  
  

Requirements
  
Strong portfolio demonstrating hand-painted digital art skills and a keen eye for painting, composition, concept art and UI.
  
Able seamlessly to switch between more illustrated graphic design and realistic painting.
  
Working experience designing UI from concept to final implementation.
  
Understanding of UX principles and ability to collaborate with UX specialists.
  
Moderate scripting skills for UI integration.
  
Comfortable using English in spoken and written form.
  
  

Bonus Skills
  
Understanding of briefing and feedbacking outsource vendors
  
Passion for Paradox’s grand strategy titles or modding and interest in historical themes.
  
Skills in CSS, Actionscript, Javascript and HTML.

* Experience with writing automated tests for UI — unit tests, integration tests, UI automation tests; familiarity with relevant testing frameworks.
* Experience with performance optimization for desktop apps (memory usage, startup time, rendering performance, high-DPI support, responsiveness under load).
* Experience with localization/globalization, right-to-left UI support, internationalization, accessibility for multiple regions.
* Familiarity with telemetry, analytics, crash reporting, logging, and error monitoring in desktop applications.
* Previous experience in shaping CI/CD workflows, release pipelines, and deployment strategies for desktop applications.
* Demonstrated ability to take ownership of feature areas or modules and drive them long-term, including maintenance, refactoring, and technical debt management.


**What we offer**


* A high-impact role: you will define architecture, shape the future of our Windows product, and directly influence what millions of users see and experience.
* A collaborative, flat-structure engineering culture — you are not just a coder, but a builder and a decision-maker.
* Opportunities to lead — mentor others, steer technical direction, and grow into broader technical leadership (e.g. Tech Lead, Architect).
* Flexibility, autonomy, and responsibility: you define how to solve problems, own features end-to-end, and contribute to long-term product vision.
* A purpose-driven mission: building software that's reliable, accessible, and user-centered — making a real difference for people.

**The Sweden Based** Salary range for this role is: 30,000-115,000 USD/Year + Bonus + Stock depending on experience.


**Think you're a good fit for this job?**



Tell us more about yourself and why you're interested in the role when you apply.  

And don't forget to include links to your portfolio and LinkedIn.


**Not looking but know someone who would make a great fit?**  

Refer them!


**Speechify is committed to a diverse and inclusive workplace.**  

Speechify does not discriminate on the basis of race, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, age, or other legally protected status.

title: Senior Software Engineer, Windows/Desktop Applications - Gothenburg, Sweden
description:
**Mission**

The mission of Speechify is to make sure that reading is never a barrier to learning.



Over 50 million people use Speechify's text-to-speech products to turn whatever they're reading – PDFs, books, Google Docs, news articles, websites – into audio, so they can read faster, read more, and remember more. Speechify's text-to-speech reading products include its iOS app, Android App, Mac App, Chrome Extension, and Web App. Google recently named Speechify the Chrome Extension of the Year and Apple named Speechify its 2025 Design Award winner for Inclusivity.


Today, nearly 200 people around the globe work on Speechify in a 100% distributed setting – Speechify has no office. These include frontend and backend engineers, AI research scientists, and others from Amazon, Microsoft, and Google, leading PhD programs like Stanford, high growth startups like Stripe, Vercel, Bolt, and many founders of their own companies



**What You'll Do**
* Lead the design, architecture, and development of native Windows desktop applications using Windows App SDK, WinUI (or related UI frameworks), C#, XAML, and — when needed — C++.
* Define and enforce best-practices for Windows desktop development across the codebase: code architecture, performance, memory usage, responsive UI, cross-version compatibility (Windows 10/11+), and maintainability.
* Drive accessibility efforts: integrate and validate support for accessibility APIs (e.g. Microsoft UI Automation or other relevant Windows accessibility frameworks), ensure UI controls, focus management, keyboard navigation, screen-reader support, and usability for users with disabilities.
* Collaborate closely with product designers, UX researchers, QA, and other stakeholders to shape feature planning, UI/UX architecture, and long-term roadmap for the Windows platform.
* Take ownership of full lifecycle of features: conception design implementation testing release maintenance. Ensure quality, reliability, and consistency across releases.
* Identify, diagnose, and resolve complex bugs, performance bottlenecks, memory leaks, rendering issues, or compatibility problems — and propose robust architectural or design solutions.


**An ideal candidate should have**
**Required:**


* 3+ in Windows desktop application development using Windows App SDK, WinUI (or similar), C#, XAML — and ideally additional experience with native Windows code (C++, Win32/WinRT/COM).
* Deep understanding of Windows application architecture, including interop between managed code (.NET) and native code.
* Proven track record of designing, building, and shipping production-quality desktop applications, with an emphasis on reliability, performance, scalability, and maintainability.
* Strong experience with accessibility APIs on Windows (e.g. Microsoft UI Automation or similar), and a dedication to building accessible and inclusive software.
* Excellent software engineering fundamentals: OOP, design patterns, data structures, algorithms, memory management, multi-threading or asynchronous programming (where relevant).
* Experience leading technical design, mentoring other engineers, conducting code reviews, and making architecture-level decisions.
* Strong communication skills; ability to articulate tradeoffs, collaborate with cross-functional teams, and drive consensus.
* A user-centric mindset: focus on building polished, intuitive, and accessible experiences for end users.


**Preferred / Bonus:**


* Experience with writing automated tests for UI — unit tests, integration tests, UI automation tests; familiarity with relevant testing frameworks.
* Experience with performance optimization for desktop apps (memory usage, startup time, rendering performance, high-DPI support, responsiveness under load).
* Experience with localization/globalization, right-to-left UI support, internationalization, accessibility for multiple regions.
* Familiarity with telemetry, analytics, crash reporting, logging, and error monitoring in desktop applications.
* Previous experience in shaping CI/CD workflows, release pipelines, and deployment strategies for desktop applications.
* Demonstrated ability to take ownership of feature areas or modules and drive them long-term, including maintenance, refactoring, and technical debt management.


**What we offer**


* A high-impact role: you will define architecture, shape the future of our Windows product, and directly influence what millions of users see and experience.
* A collaborative, flat-structure engineering culture — you are not just a coder, but a builder and a decision-maker.
* Opportunities to lead — mentor others, steer technical direction, and grow into broader technical leadership (e.g. Tech Lead, Architect).
* Flexibility, autonomy, and responsibility: you define how to solve problems, own features end-to-end, and contribute to long-term product vision.
* A purpose-driven mission: building software that's reliable, accessible, and user-centered — making a real difference for people.

**The Sweden Based** Salary range for this role is: 30,000-115,000 USD/Year + Bonus + Stock depending on experience.


**Think you're a good fit for this job?**



Tell us more about yourself and why you're interested in the role when you apply.  

And don't forget to include links to your portfolio and LinkedIn.


**Not looking but know someone who would make a great fit?**  

Refer them!

Speechify does not discriminate on the basis of race, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, age, or other legally protected status.

title: Senior Software Engineer, Core Experiences - Malmö, Sweden
description:
**Mission**


**Speechify is the easiest way to listen to the world's information.** Articles on the web, documents in the cloud, books on your phone. We absorb it all and let you listen to it at your desk, on the go, at your own speed, and with tools that make learning easier, deeper, and faster.



What streaming services have done for audio entertainment, we're doing for audio information. And whatever we're doing seems to be working. We're #1 in our category, and experiencing exponential growth.


**Overview**



We're looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our Core Experiences Team. This team builds and maintains the foundational services and SDKs that power Speechify's product experience across platforms. It's a critical role for someone who enjoys working at the intersection of product and infrastructure, thinks strategically, and is passionate about designing clear, reliable APIs and simple systems that directly enhance the user experience.


**What Yo****u'****ll Do**


* Collaborate with Speechify's Product Teams to scope projects, find ways to reduce scope to get faster feedback from customers, navigate the integration/UX tradeoffs relevant to different product teams, and deliver solutions via our cross-platform SDK
* Optimize existing functionality to ship things like faster loading and more intelligent parsing by designing more efficient abstractions and improving our algorithms
* Ship cloud functions, lightweight backend services, and jobs using Kotlin


**An Ideal Candidate Should Have**


* Systems thinking. You know that optimizing a system requires end-to-end design, and you believe simplicity is valuable.
* Speed. You work quickly to generate ideas and options and know how to decide which things can ship now and what things need time
* Focus. We're a high-growth startup with a busy, remote team. You know how and when to engage or be heads down
* Collaboration. You know how to inspire, play, and negotiate with opinionated designers, marketers, and PMs
* Preferred Tech Stack:
	+ Kotlin Multiplatform (Java experience is OK but role is Kotlin Multiplatform)
	+ Prior experience with GCP is a plus

**What We Offer**

* A fast-growing environment where you can help shape the company and product.
* An entrepreneurial-minded team that supports risk, intuition, and hustle.
* A hands-off management approach so you can focus and do your best work.
* An opportunity to make a big impact in a transformative industry.
* Competitive salaries, a friendly and laid-back atmosphere, and a commitment to building a great asynchronous culture.
* Opportunity to work on a life-changing product that millions of people use.
* Build products that directly impact and support people with learning differences like dyslexia, ADD, low vision, concussions, autism, and more.
* Work in one of the fastest growing sectors of tech, the intersection of artificial intelligence and audio.


**The Sweden Based** Salary range for this role is: 30,000-115,000 USD/Year + Bonus + Stock depending on experience.


**Think you're a good fit for this job?**



Tell us more about yourself and why you're interested in the role when you apply.
  

And don't forget to include links to your portfolio and LinkedIn.


**Not looking but know someone who would make a great fit?**



Refer them!


**Speechify is committed to a diverse and inclusive workplace.**



Speechify does not discriminate on the basis of race, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, age, or other legally protected status.

title: AI ingenjör
description:
Nu letar vi efter en **AI Ingenjör** till ESSIQ Stockholm! ESSIQ är arbetsgivaren som anstränger sig lite extra för att du ska må bra. Vad är medarbetarfokus för dig? På ESSIQ handlar det om att sätta medarbetaren i centrum. Genom ett lyhört ledarskap och en öppen företagskultur vill vi ge varje medarbetare möjligheten att forma sin karriär och sin vardag.


Till den här rollen söker vi dig som har erfarenhet av AI, mjukvaruutveckling och datadrivna lösningar och som är redo för nya utmaningar. Ser du fördelarna med att få variation och erfarenhet från olika kunder och branscher men att utvecklas med en och samma arbetsgivare? Som medarbetare på ESSIQ får du det bästa av två världar.

###### **ROLLBESKRIVNING**


Som **AI Ingenjör** arbetar du med att utveckla framtidens intelligenta och datadrivna system. Rollen kan innefatta allt från utveckling av AI- och Machine Learning-lösningar till datahantering, analys av sensordata och avancerad mjukvaruutveckling. Du kommer att arbeta nära utvecklingsteam, systemingenjörer och verksamhet för att skapa lösningar som genererar verkligt värde för användare och kunder.


I rollen kan du komma att arbeta med:

* Utveckling och implementation av AI- och Machine Learning-modeller
* Datainsamling, databehandling och Data Engineering
* Analys och bearbetning av sensordata
* Utveckling av mjukvara i C
* Utveckling av datadrivna produkter och tjänster
* Integration mellan mjukvara, hårdvara och molnplattformar
* Teknisk problemlösning i komplexa systemmiljöer
* Arkitektur, prototyputveckling och produktionssättning av AI-lösningar


Vi förväntar oss att du har ett användarcentrerat, lösningsorienterat arbetssätt och att du är öppen, nytänkande och professionell. En anställning hos oss innebär både trygghet och frihet, där vi stöttar dig så mycket som du vill och behöver. För oss är det viktigt att du får vara delaktig i att forma din karriärväg och att du är med och påverkar ESSIQ som företag och arbetsplats.

###### **KVALIFIKATIONER**


Vi letar inte efter anställda, vi letar efter medarbetare – efter ESSIQ:are! Nedanstående är de grundläggande kvalifikationerna för tjänsten, men vi kommer även lägga stor vikt vid din personlighet.

###### **Grundläggande kvalifikationer**

* Civil- eller högskoleingenjör inom datateknik, elektroteknik, teknisk fysik, mekatronik eller motsvarande.
* Minst 5 års relevant arbetslivserfarenhet inom mjukvaruutveckling, AI, Data Engineering eller närliggande område.
* Mycket god programmeringsvana i C.
* Erfarenhet av mjukvaruutveckling i komplexa tekniska miljöer.
* Erfarenhet av datahantering, analys eller datadrivna lösningar.
* Erfarenhet av Linux-baserade utvecklingsmiljöer.
* Behärskar svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.

###### **Meriterande kvalifikationer**

* Embeddedutveckling i C/C++.
* Erfarenhet av Machine Learning eller AI-lösningar i produktion.
* Data Engineering och databearbetning.
* Sensorfusion, signalbehandling eller sensordata.
* Cloudplattformar såsom AWS, Azure eller GCP.
* Erfarenhet från försvarsindustri eller andra säkerhetskritiska system.
* Erfarenhet av radar-, kamera- eller andra sensorsystem.

###### **Personlighet och engagemang**

* Du är ansvarstagande – kommer i mål, i medvind likväl som i motvind.
* Du är social och kommunikativ – öppen och tydlig gentemot dina kollegor, och är en produktiv problemlösare.
* Du är nyfiken och drivs av att lära dig nya tekniker och domäner.
* Du är lösningsorienterad och ser helheten snarare än enbart din egen del av leveransen.
* Du är lyhörd och hjälpsam – tar in kunskap från omvärld och kollegor, och delar gärna med dig av din egen.
* Du är prestigelös och trivs med att samarbeta i tvärfunktionella team.

###### **OM TJÄNSTEN**

* Anställningsform: Tillsvidareanställning på heltid. 6 månaders provanställning tillämpas.
* Tillträde: Enligt överenskommelse.
* Lön och förmåner: Konkurrenskraftig lön, goda utvecklingsmöjligheter och generösa förmåner. Tjänstepension och omfattande försäkringar.
* Placering: ESSIQ Öst – Stockholm med omnejd.

**OM ESSIQ**  

ESSIQ är teknikkonsultföretaget där allt börjar med dig. Med fokus på individen, flexibla lösningar och en modern lönepolicy attraherar vi de skarpaste, mest professionella och engagerade personerna i branschen. Med denna vision grundades ESSIQ år 2005, sedan dess har vi utvecklats till ett framgångsrikt företag med kontor i Stockholm, Göteborg och Malmö. Vi består idag av över 200 medarbetare med olika bakgrund, personlighet och nationalitet, med en god fördelning av kvinnor och män.


Vi har över 80 aktiva kunder i spännande branscher – allt från de stora aktörerna till de små innovationsföretagen. ESSIQ:s medarbetare arbetar med användarcentrerad tjänste- och produktutveckling inom följande tjänsteområden: UX & Service Design, Connected & Embedded Systems, IT & Cloud Services, Green Technology & Electromobility, Test & Quality Engineering, Agile Management, Mechanical Engineering samt Simulation & Visualization. Kompetensen levererar vi på plats hos uppdragsgivaren, inhouse och i satellit. Våra medarbetares intressen och ambitioner leder vägen – vårt mål är att göra den perfekta matchningen av individ och uppdrag.


ESSIQ är ett familjärt och socialt företag med visionen att vara Sveriges bästa arbetsgivare för alla medarbetare, oavsett roll i organisationen. Vi lägger stor vikt vid gemenskap och har ett uppskattat utbud av professionella och sociala aktiviteter. Vår kommunikationsplattform genomsyras av öppenhet, och främjar nätverkande och kompetensutbyte såväl som fritidsaktiviteter och relationsbyggande.

**ANSÖKAN**  

Vi använder oss av rekryteringsverktyget Teamtailor. Ansök senast den 10/8-2026.

**KONTAKT**  

Frågor om tjänsten? Kontakta: Josefine Cassel, josefine.cassel@essiq.se  

Vill du veta mer om ESSIQ?  

Besök http://essiq.se och följ oss på våra sociala medier!

title: Product Manager – Savings & Monthly Savings
description:
*Nu söker vi en Product Manager som vill leda arbetet med att erbjuda marknadens vassaste sparkonto och hjälpa våra kunder till en sundare ekonomi genom att utveckla vårt erbjudande inom månadssparande. Här blir du nyckelpersonen som sätter riktningen för teamet och skapar ett produkterbjudande i världsklass.*

**Om tjänsten**


Som Product Manager leder du ett tvärfunktionellt produktteam på åtta personer (utvecklare och UX-designer). Teamet ansvarar idag för Sparkonto, men tar nu även över helhetsansvaret för månadssparande. Ert gemensamma uppdrag är att säkerställa rätt produkterbjudande, prissättning och användarupplevelse för att hjälpa fler kunder att hålla i sitt sparande över tid.


Du har det övergripande ansvaret för produktens strategi, utveckling och marknadsanpassning. Då månadssparande berör flera delar av organisationen och teamet inte är helt autonomt, blir en viktig del av din vardag att kommunicera brett, bygga starka partnerskap och driva större initiativ framåt tillsammans med andra team.

**Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter:**

* Utveckla, kommunicera och förankra produktstrategi och vision.
* Driva det datadrivna och hypotesbaserade arbetet – från discovery till lansering.
* Prioritera initiativ utifrån kundvärde, affärsnytta och genomförbarhet (och våga välja väg även när roadmapen inte är spikad).
* Ansvara för prissättningen och produktens kommersiella utveckling.
* Definiera mål och KPI:er för teamet (med fokus på t.ex. aktiva sparare och öppnade konton) samt löpande följa upp resultat.
* Agera brygga mellan affär, teknik och användare – internt såväl som externt.
* Coacha, engagera och svetsa samman produktteamet i deras nya, utökade uppdrag.


Du kommer att tillhöra området Financial Future, som ansvarar för vårt breda produkt- och pensionserbjudande och består av cirka 10 team. Här ingår du i en stark grupp av Product Managers och rapporterar till Area Lead för Financial Future.

**Vem vi söker**


Vi söker en trygg, nyfiken och affärsdriven ledare (gärna på Senior PM-nivå) som trivs i en föränderlig miljö. Eftersom teamet och scopet är delvis nytt behöver du motiveras av att navigera i det ovissa, testa hypoteser och själv staka ut vägen framåt. Du har en stark helhetssyn, är skicklig på att prioritera och har ett genuint engagemang för att skapa kundvärde. Som ledare är du inkluderande, tydlig och skicklig på att få med dig människor – både i det egna teamet och bland externa intressenter.

**Vi ser gärna att du har:**

* Flera års erfarenhet som Product Manager, med fördel inom konsumentnära digitala produkter.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i en reglerad miljö (t.ex. bank, finans eller fintech).
* Erfarenhet av att leda komplexa initiativ som sträcker sig över flera team och kräver god samarbetsförmåga.
* En stark verktygslåda inom produkt-discovery och hypotesdriven utveckling (både kvalitativ och kvantitativ data).
* Erfarenhet av prissättning, personalisering eller bankprodukter är starkt meriterande.

**Ansökan**  

Skicka din ansökan genom att klicka på knappen ”Ansök nu”. Skicka gärna din ansökan snarast då urvalet sker löpande, **dock senast 21/6**. Vi tar inte emot ansökningar via mejl p.g.a. GDPR.


Välkommen med din ansökan!


Erbjudanden från rekryteringsföretag/annonssäljare undanbedes.
company_description: Med visionen om att skapa en bättre framtid för miljoner människor går vi till jobbet för att skapa billigare, bättre och enklare produkter och tjänster för våra kunder!

title: UX Designer Mobile App
description:
**This is Worldline** 




 Help shape the future of how the world pays and gets paid. At Worldline, we enable businesses of all sizes to grow quickly, simply, and securely. As a leader in the payments industry, we power millions of companies across five continents. Just as we drive our customers' growth, we support our people in building their careers. Together, we shape the evolution of payments.
 



 If you're passionate about designing intuitive mobile experiences and eager to shape how merchants manage their business on the go, this is your chance. Join us and help redefine how the world pays.
 



  





**The opportunity** 




 Design at Worldline is going through an exciting transformation. We're raising the bar — fast. We're building a world-class design system, embedding user-centered thinking deeper into how products are shaped, and growing a diverse, talented team that is genuinely changing how the organisation approaches design. The momentum is real, the ambition is high, and the impact is visible.
 



  





 As a Product Designer with a mobile focus in the Worldline Design team, you will play a crucial role in shaping our mobile product experiences — the way our customers interact with our solutions on the go. Your mission is to advocate for the user's needs, defining and implementing intuitive solutions for the product direction, visuals, and experience to enhance their overall mobile user journey. You will bring deep expertise in native mobile design, leveraging your understanding of platform conventions, touch-first interactions, and on-the-go usage contexts to craft experiences that feel natural and effortless. While your primary focus will be on mobile, you will also contribute to the broader product experience, ensuring seamless continuity across platforms.
 



  





 This role is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
 



  





**Day-to-day responsibilities** 



* Design intuitive mobile app interfaces for Worldline's payment solutions, delivering experiences that delight users across iOS and Android platforms.
* Champion mobile-specific design patterns, including touch interactions, gestures, responsive layouts, and platform-specific conventions (Human Interface Guidelines & Material Design).
* Collaborate with our Design System experts to grow and improve our world-class Design System, ensuring scalability and consistency across mobile platforms.
* Transform business needs into clear, compelling mobile designs, interactions, and micro-animations.
* Design and prototype end-to-end mobile flows, considering connectivity states, performance constraints, and on-the-go usage contexts.
* Participate in design workshops and mobile usability testing to validate and refine your work together with colleagues.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams — including mobile developers, product managers, and researchers — to deliver a polished, cohesive user experience.
* Stay ahead of mobile industry trends, bringing fresh ideas and inspiration that elevate our standards.
* Actively explore opportunities for our business and the field of UX with generative and Agentic AI, particularly in mobile contexts.
* Validate your designs with real users to measure impact and continuously seek opportunities to optimise and improve their mobile experience.
* Become an active member of the Worldline Design team, contributing your mobile expertise and learning from colleagues across the broader design organisation.



  





**Who are we looking for** 




 We look for talented, thoughtful designers who care about their craft. People who bring fresh perspectives, step up and show what's next — optimistic, upbeat people with a can-do attitude, a hunger to learn and grow, and a genuine love for collaboration. In practice this means:
 


* 3+ years of experience in product design, with a strong focus on native mobile app design (iOS and/or Android).
* Deep knowledge of mobile design patterns, platform guidelines (Apple HIG, Material Design), and mobile interaction paradigms including gestures, haptics, and adaptive layouts.
* Proven experience designing and shipping mobile apps, with the ability to demonstrate impact on user engagement and satisfaction.
* Experience working with scrum teams and tools like Jira and Confluence, and strong skills in Figma including mobile prototyping and handoff workflows.
* Experience in UI design and micro-interactions, with a particular strength in mobile motion design and transitions.
* Strong verbal and written English communication skills, with the ability to present your design thinking clearly to audiences with varying levels of design understanding.
* Deep empathy for users and a passion for representing their needs and motivations to diverse stakeholder groups, especially in mobile-first and on-the-go contexts.
* Creative problem-solving skills and a thoughtful, proactive mindset in identifying opportunities for improving the user experience.
* An optimistic, collaborative personality — you bring warmth and energy to the team, value diverse perspectives, and believe the best work happens when people support each other.
* Experience in B2B SaaS and/or the Payments sector is a nice-to-have — what we care about most is your mobile design craft. Industry knowledge you'll learn on the job.
* You have an online portfolio showcasing mobile app design work, which you can share upon application.
* You are available to work full time.



  





**Perks & Benefits** 




 At Worldline you'll get the chance to be at the heart of the global payments technology industry and shape how the world pays and gets paid. On top of that, you will also:
 


* Work with inspiring colleagues in a supportive, inclusive environment and be empowered to learn, grow and accelerate your career.
* Health contribution
* Health check – Every 2:nd year
* Private Health Care Insurance (EuroAccident)
* Parental pay and 12 months pension during parental leave
* Opportunity to hybrid working according to company standard
* Benefit portal with many great offers, plus more.



  





**Shape the evolution** 




 We are pushing towards the next frontiers of payments technology, and we look for talented people to join our journey. People with passion, a can-do attitude and a hunger to learn and grow. Here you'll work with ambitious colleagues from around the world, take on unique challenges as a team, and make a real impact on society. And with our empowering culture, strong technology and extensive training opportunities, we help you accelerate your career. Wherever you decide to go. Join our global team of over 18,000 innovators across 40+ countries, and shape a tomorrow that is yours to own.
 



  





 Learn more about life at Worldline at jobs.worldline.com
 



  





 We are proud to be an Equal Opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, colour, national origin, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as an individual with a disability, or any applicable legally protected characteristics.

title: Lead UX/UI Designer
description:
**This is Worldline** 




 Help shape the future of how the world pays and gets paid. At Worldline, we enable businesses of all sizes to grow quickly, simply, and securely. As a leader in the payments industry, we power millions of companies across five continents. Just as we drive our customers' growth, we support our people in building their careers. Together, we shape the evolution of payments.
 



  





 If you're passionate about leading design that makes a real difference and ready to help shape the direction of a talented, growing design team, this is your chance. Join us and help redefine how the world pays.
 



  





**The opportunity** 




 Design at Worldline is going through an exciting transformation. We're raising the bar — fast. We're building a world-class design system, embedding user-centered thinking deeper into how products are shaped, and growing a diverse, talented team that is genuinely changing how the organisation approaches design. The momentum is real, the ambition is high, and the impact is visible. This is a rare moment: the kind where a strong design leader can help define what great looks like for years to come.
 



  





 As Lead Product Designer in the Worldline Design team, you will be a driving force behind design quality, strategic direction, and team development. You will lead by example — setting the bar for craft and user advocacy — while coaching and mentoring fellow designers to grow their skills and confidence. Your mission is to connect business strategy with user needs, translating complex product challenges into coherent, intuitive experiences across our portfolio. You will work closely with product management, engineering leads, and senior stakeholders to ensure design has a strong voice at the table, and you will help shape the practices and culture of our design organisation.
 



  





 This role is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
 



  





**Day-to-day responsibilities** 



* Lead the design direction for key product areas, ensuring a coherent and high-quality user experience across complex payment solutions.
* Mentor and coach product designers, fostering a culture of continuous improvement, craft excellence, and constructive, supportive design critique.
* Partner with product managers, engineering leads, and business stakeholders to define product strategy and roadmaps, ensuring user needs are represented from the start.
* Guide design projects from discovery through delivery — setting direction, navigating trade-offs thoughtfully, and ensuring design intent is preserved in implementation.
* Facilitate design workshops, design sprints, and cross-team alignment sessions that bring out the best thinking in everyone involved.
* Collaborate with our Design System experts to champion consistency, scalability, and quality across products.
* Raise the bar on user research integration — ensuring designs are grounded in evidence and validated with real users.
* Actively explore opportunities for our business and the field of UX with generative and Agentic AI.
* Stay ahead of industry trends and bring strategic perspective on how emerging patterns and technologies can elevate our products.
* Contribute to the growth and culture of the Worldline Design team — championing an inclusive, supportive environment where diverse perspectives make the work stronger.



  





**Who are we looking for** 




 We look for talented, thoughtful design leaders who care about their craft and the people around them. People who bring fresh perspectives, step up and show what's next — optimistic, upbeat people with a can-do attitude, a hunger to learn and grow, and a genuine love for collaboration. In practice this means:
 


* 7+ years of experience in product design, with at least 2 years in a lead, senior, or principal design role where you have guided other designers.
* A strong portfolio demonstrating end-to-end product design leadership across complex, multi-stakeholder projects.
* Proven ability to mentor and develop designers, providing thoughtful, actionable feedback and fostering professional growth and confidence.
* Experience partnering with product management and engineering at a strategic level to shape product direction.
* Sophisticated skills in Figma and other design tools, with the ability to establish and promote best practices within a team.
* Strong understanding of user research methodologies and the ability to integrate insights into the design process at the right moments.
* Excellent verbal and written English communication skills, with the ability to influence senior stakeholders and articulate design rationale clearly.
* Deep empathy for users and a passion for representing their needs and motivations — even when business pressures push in other directions.
* A systems-thinking mindset, comfortable navigating complexity, ambiguity, and trade-offs across a broad product portfolio.
* An optimistic, collaborative personality — you lead with warmth, value diverse perspectives, lift others up, and believe the best work happens when people support each other.
* Experience in B2B SaaS and/or the Payments sector is a nice-to-have — exceptional design leadership is what matters most, and industry knowledge you'll pick up on the job.
* You have an online portfolio showcasing your work and design leadership, which you can share upon application.
* You are available to work full time.



  





**Perks & Benefits** 




 At Worldline you'll get the chance to be at the heart of the global payments technology industry and shape how the world pays and gets paid. On top of that, you will also:
 


* Work with inspiring colleagues in a supportive, inclusive environment and be empowered to learn, grow and accelerate your career.
* Health contribution
* Health check – Every 2:nd year
* Private Health Care Insurance (EuroAccident)
* Parental pay and 12 months pension during parental leave
* Opportunity to hybrid working according to company standard
* Benefit portal with many great offers, plus more.



  





**Shape the evolution** 




 We are pushing towards the next frontiers of payments technology, and we look for talented people to join our journey. People with passion, a can-do attitude and a hunger to learn and grow. Here you'll work with ambitious colleagues from around the world, take on unique challenges as a team, and make a real impact on society. And with our empowering culture, strong technology and extensive training opportunities, we help you accelerate your career. Wherever you decide to go. Join our global team of over 18,000 innovators across 40+ countries, and shape a tomorrow that is yours to own.
 



  





 Learn more about life at Worldline at jobs.worldline.com
 



  





 We are proud to be an Equal Opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, colour, national origin, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as an individual with a disability, or any applicable legally protected characteristics.

title: Senior Product Designer
description:
Vill du bygga framtidens nyhetsupplevelse tillsammans med oss?
   

  

 Omni söker en Senior Product Designer som vill arbeta nära produkt, UX och utveckling för att skapa smartare, snabbare och bättre nyhetsupplevelser. Det här är en roll för dig som drivs av möjligheten att använda AI, stark produktdesign och ny teknik för att hjälpa människor att förstå vad som händer i världen – på ett sätt som är mer relevant, personligt och anpassat efter deras behov.
   

  

 Hos oss får du arbeta med en av Sveriges starkaste nyhetsprodukter, i ett team där idéer snabbt kan bli verklighet. Om du vill jobba med nyheter på en plats där produktutveckling, användarupplevelse och AI på riktigt kan förändra hur människor konsumerar och förstår nyheter, är Omni där du vill vara.
   

  

 Det här är en roll för dig som gillar att få saker att hända. Du är både strukturerad och hands-on, trivs i gränslandet mellan produkt, design och teknik och tycker om att lösa problem tillsammans med andra.
   

  

 Om rollen
   

  

 Du kommer att arbeta tätt tillsammans med Head of Product, Head of UX och utvecklingsteamet i det dagliga produktarbetet. Tjänsten är en projektanställning på 12 månader med god möjlighet till förlängning.
   

  

 Rollen är bred och operativ med stort fokus på genomförande, problemlösning och samarbete.
   

  

**Exempel På Arbetsuppgifter**
* Driva och projektleda mindre produktinitiativ tillsammans med andra teammedlemmar
* Ta fram skisser och wireframes i Figma utifrån användarbehov, affärsbehov och tekniska möjligheter
* Arbeta nära utvecklare för att förtydliga lösningar och säkerställa bra leverans
* Vara med och definiera produktkrav, flöden och affärsregler
* Översätta användarbehov och organisatoriska behov till konkreta produktlösningar
* Hjälpa till att strukturera och driva arbete framåt
* Bidra till utvecklingen av våra produkter, processer och arbetssätt
* Utforska hur AI och ny teknik kan förbättra våra produkter och användarupplevelser


 Vi tror att du
   

  

* Är en stark problemlösare som gillar att ta ansvar och driva arbete framåt
* Är operativ och trivs med att vara hands-on
* Har erfarenhet av produktutveckling i digitala produkter och appar
* Har gedigen erfarenhet av UX- och UI-arbete och är bekant med relevanta verktyg såsom Figma
* Är van att arbeta nära utvecklare
* Tänker ur ett helhetsperspektiv utifrån användarbehov, affärsmål och tekniska förutsättningar
* Är nyfiken på AI, nya verktyg och modern produktutveckling
* Kommunicerar tydligt och samarbetar bra med olika typer av kompetenser på svenska såväl engelska


 Det är ett extra plus om du är intresserad av media, nyheter eller innehållsdrivna produkter.
   

  

 Hos Omni
   

  

 På Omni arbetar vi med produkter som används av flera hundratusentals människor varje vecka. Vi är ett litet och snabbfotat team där idéer snabbt kan bli verklighet och där produkt, UX och teknik arbetar nära varandra.
   

  

 Hos Omni är alla medarbetares insatser, kunskap och idéer lika mycket värda. Det har skapat en stark, prestigelös och samarbetsdriven kultur där människor hjälper varandra och där bra idéer kan komma från vem som helst.
   

  

 Entreprenörsandan är viktig för oss och bidrar till en utvecklande och stimulerande arbetsmiljö där det finns stort utrymme att testa nytt, ta initiativ och påverka både produkterna och hur vi arbetar framåt.

title: Sr. Product Designer (UI/UX & Design Systems)
description:
**About TVM** 




 TVM is a leading Digital Out of Home (DOOH) platform connecting brands to consumers in nearly 3,000 sports bar venues across the U.S., with a network of 7,000+ screens in nearly every major region. We specialize in reaching fans in live, social viewing environments, where sports, culture, and commerce intersect, enabling contextually relevant messaging that drives engagement and action in real time.
 



  





**About the Role** 




 We’re looking for an experienced Senior Product Designer to help create scalable, responsive, and implementation-ready digital products.
 



  





 This role is ideal for someone who combines strong visual design skills with a deep understanding of
 **Figma, design systems, responsive layouts, and engineering handoff** 
 . You should be comfortable designing products in a way that minimizes the gap between design and development.
 



  





 Experience with
 **sports, live content, betting, fan engagement, or entertainment products** 
 is a strong plus.
 



  





**What You’ll Do** 



* Design high-quality user experiences and interfaces across web and mobile products
* Create organized, developer-friendly Figma files and component systems
* Use Figma best practices including: Components and variants, auto layout and constraints, variables and design tokens, and responsive design principles
* Design scalable, implementation-ready interfaces across multiple screen sizes
* Collaborate closely with Product and Engineering teams throughout the design process
* Build and improve design systems, component libraries, and documentation
* Create prototypes and interaction flows as needed
* Translate product and business requirements into intuitive design solutions
* Review implemented designs and provide feedback to maintain quality and consistency
* Design experiences for live or content-rich environments such as scoreboards, match pages, leaderboards, tournament views, or fan engagement products



  





**What We’re Looking For** 




**Core Skills** 



* Strong experience as a Product Designer, UI Designer, or UX/UI Designer
* Advanced Figma expertise
* Strong understanding of how designs are built and implemented in production environments
* Ability to design with technical and engineering constraints in mind
* Experience creating clear developer handoff documentation
* Strong visual design skills including typography, spacing, hierarchy, layout, and consistency
* Experience designing for both web and mobile products
* Ability to work independently and take ownership of design quality
* Strong communication and collaboration skills



  





**Nice to Have** 



* Experience working alongside frontend teams using React, Svelte, or similar frameworks
* Understanding of CSS, breakpoints, and component-based UI development
* Experience designing dashboards, admin tools, or media platforms
* Experience with motion design, micro-interactions, or prototyping
* Experience in sports media, betting, AdTech, DOOH, gaming, or entertainment products



  





**Who You Are** 




 You create more than polished screens, you design systems and experiences that developers can build efficiently and consistently. You understand that great design is scalable, responsive, and well-structured, with clear documentation and thoughtful collaboration behind it.
 



  





*TVM Media is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic under applicable law.*

title: Head of Design
description:
We’re looking for a Head of Design who can shape how Froda looks, feels, and works. This is a role for someone who understands both brand and product, and who can lead through others by setting direction, enabling teams, and driving high-quality outcomes. Someone who can create design that is not only visually strong and modern, but also intuitive, thoughtful, and effective.
 



  





**About Froda** 




 Founded in 2015, Froda’s mission is to democratize access to financing, giving small businesses the same growth opportunities as large ones. Through digital innovation, we’ve transformed the loan process from months to minutes, offering fair, fast, and accessible financing. Now, through embedded lending, we’re integrating our technology with global banks and fintechs, building the next generation of lending infrastructure. Join us in creating opportunities for small businesses to invest in their ideas to the best possible terms.
 



  





**What you will do** 




 You will own the full visual expression of Froda, ensuring everything we create feels cohesive, clear, and of the highest quality. You will lead design across all touchpoints, from overall brand alignment to the end-to-end design of Froda’s product and partner experiences.
 



  





 This role goes beyond aesthetics. You design to communicate with clarity, guide user behavior, and create meaningful impact and business growth. You will work closely with all different stakeholders inside the company, but mainly with Marketing, Product, and Business Development.
 



  





**You will:** 



* Evolve and strengthen Froda's existing visual identity and design principles
* Ensure consistency and excellence across all brand and product touchpoints
* Translate Froda's brand strategy into a cohesive design system and experience
* Ensure design drives high-quality user experiences across all touchpoints
* Own the design system, while embedding design in product discovery and decision-making
* Be hands-on where needed while defining how design works at Froda and raising the overall level of craft
* Set clear direction and priorities for design, ensuring strong alignment with business goals and product strategy
* Coach and support designers and cross-functional partners to elevate both craft and ways of working
* Drive a culture of ownership, feedback, and continuous improvement within design and across teams



  





**Who you are** 



* An experienced designer (10+ year of experience within the field) with a strong track record across both brand and digital product experiences
* You combine strategic thinking with hands-on execution and enjoy creating, not just directing.
* You drive UX, UI, and design thinking across teams, not just visual design. Creating experiences that are both beautiful and functional
* You care deeply about quality, clarity, and consistency
* You are highly proficient in modern design, web and AI tools (e.g. Figma, Adobe Creative Suite, Webflow, Claude, etc.)
* You have experience from a startup, scaleup, or agency environment and thrive in a moving organisation
* You are pragmatic, proactive, and focused on getting things done
* You lead through clarity, give direct feedback, and influence, helping teams make better decisions and deliver stronger results.
* You are fluent in English, Swedish is a plus.



  





**What’s in it for you?** 




 At Froda, you’ll be part of a company that combines the best of both worlds, a fast-moving, high-energy culture with the stability and structure to support long-term success. We’re 100+ ambitious self-starters who genuinely care for each other and the work we do, all while having fun together.
 



  





 Here, you’ll have the opportunity to shape how Froda looks, feels, and is experienced as we continue to scale across Europe. You’ll play a key role in evolving our brand, product experience, and design practices, helping create experiences that build trust, drive clarity, and make a meaningful impact for small businesses.
 



  





 Furthermore, you’ll get:
 


* An opportunity to shape and strengthen the design experience across both brand and product at a European fintech scale-up
* High ownership from day one, with the ability to influence how design works and evolves as the company grows
* The chance to define and develop a design approach that is both functional and beautiful, creating experiences that feel as good as they work
* Fabulous office overlooking Stockholm
* We prioritize working in the office to maximize the positive impact of in-person collaboration, but we offer flexibility with work hours and remote work
* Competitive compensation package
* Insurance and pension plan

title: Design Director
description:
**Are you passionate about creating exceptional user experiences while inspiring a talented creative team to thrive?**
 We are looking for a
 **Design Director** 
 who balances strategic design vision with empowering team management and a pragmatic, execution-focused mindset. We have a bold ambition to be the undisputed #1 service in the eyes of our consumers. To get there, we need a leader who has successfully built and elevated design practices before—someone who knows what "great" looks like, both in the final user experience and in the best-in-class ways of working that get us there.
   

  

 You will play a fundamental role in translating our consumer-centric strategy and ambition into world-class design execution that drives real user, business, and brand impact.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
 As the Design Director at Instabee, your mission is to embed user-centricity into our cross-functional initiatives and workflows, implement insights-driven design practices, and lead and develop our team of product and brand designers. You will collaborate closely with colleagues and stakeholders in strategy, product, analytics, tech, and operations. Together with your peers in Consumer, you will establish consumer ambassadorship and center of excellence - ensuring the consumer experience is top-of-mind in everything we do.
   

  

**Your Responsibilities Fall Into Three Key Pillars**
* Drive Design Strategy & Transformation
* Develop and continuously hone the design practices at Instabee to achieve our high consumer experience ambitions, desired brand position, user-centricity, efficiency, and business outcomes.
* Champion the end-to-end user perspective across all development phases, from discovery and design execution to post-launch optimization.
* Demonstrate the value of great design for our user experience and business goals, building trust, credibility and the strong internal relationships needed to give design a strong voice in company decisions.
* Ensure our design organization stays on the forefront of the craft: exploring and putting emerging methodologies and technologies into practice.
* Lead and Empower the Design Team
* Recruit, coach, develop, and lead a high-performing, multidisciplinary team of product and brand designers working with teams and stakeholders across the organization.
* Oversee brand and product design for Growth, Operations, Markets, and other key teams. Translate strategic business objectives and priorities into clear design strategy, adapting resources and capabilities to effectively support the organization and focus where it matters most.
* Champion high standards for design execution. Ensure design output is cohesive, high-quality, and clearly connected to user and business goals.
* Deliver Senior Design Excellence
* Keep one foot in the craft, driving own high-impact product and UX/UI design work - leading by example and showcasing best practices.
* Raise the bar for design and design processes across digital, physical and human interactions, ensuring we deliver "brilliant basics" enhanced by targeted signature “wow moments” that differentiate us.
* Act as a strong facilitator bringing cross-functional experts together to solve complex consumer challenges and drive user-centric innovation.


**Your Profile**
* 8+ years of experience in senior consumer-focused design or product UX/UI roles within a fast-paced service, product, or tech environment.
* A proven track record of design execution that drives clear user, business, and brand impact.
* Solid experience building, leading and elevating multidisciplinary design teams. Skilled at unlocking the potential of different individuals and design disciplines.
* A working-leader mindset, with a passion for keeping your own senior design craft sharp and a desire to lead by example.
* Strong change management capabilities, with a history of successfully integrating design best practices into cross-functional work and influencing without formal ownership.
* A systems-thinking approach, allowing you to see the full customer journey across touchpoints while seamlessly moving between high-level strategic alignment and hands-on operational details.
* Great communication, facilitation and leadership skills, enabling you to build trust, inspire teams, and confidently navigate complex cross-organizational environments as a strong voice for the consumer and the business value of design.


**What You’ll Get**
 We can promise you that you will be challenged, develop your skills and have the opportunity to work with truly amazing and competent colleagues. If you like changes and want to set new processes and ways of working - this is the place for you!
   

  

**Benefits**
 Of course, we have all the necessary and standard benefits in place, but in addition to this, we can also offer:
   

  

* Sky-High Office: Modern and newly renovated with a 360-degree view around Stockholm.
* Puppy Friendly: Bring your dog to work - we've got a whole floor for our furry friends!
* Fun & Games: Ping pong, Shuffleboard, Foosball, and even a Karaoke Room for your leisure time.
* Parental Pay for Six Months: Step away from work and provide the best care and love to your little one.
* A Day Off on Your Birthday: We love to celebrate, so enjoy your birthday to the fullest with a day off each year!
* Hybrid setup and flexible working hours


**Get to know us**
 In 2022, Instabee was founded after combining Budbee and Instabox - two leading last-mile delivery companies with three consumer-facing brands: Budbee, Instabox, and Porterbuddy. Instabee serves millions of consumers across Europe with convenient deliveries and is on track to become the leading European e-commerce enabler. Always with the consumer at heart.
   

  

 We’re fast, both in terms of parcel delivery and when it comes to growing our business. So far our journey has taken us from Sweden to the rest of Scandinavia and parts of continental Europe, but we have no plans on stopping anytime soon. As we continue to expand, the complexity of Instabee grows in parallel. With that in mind, we’re now looking for you to help us on the journey ahead.
   

  

*This recruitment process consists of background checks via Svensk Bakgrundsanalys as a review of previous public criminal records. The result is public information that is handled confidentially. This is mandatory for all recruitment processes at Instabee in Sweden.*
**We are reviewing applications continuously. However, please note that due to the summer holiday period, the recruitment process will be paused from June 26th to August 3rd. We will get back to all candidates after we return.**
 Instabee Group, with consumer-facing brands Budbee, Instabox, and Porterbuddy, brings together years of experience in delivery. Today, Instabee Group is present in five markets, serving thousands of online merchants and millions of consumers with seamless home deliveries and convenient parcel locker deliveries, using the best fuel available. With smart technology, a strong focus on sustainability, and a secure supply chain, Instabee has become a trusted partner for online merchants and a preferred choice for consumers.

title: Content Designer
description:
Your Mission
   

  

 As a Content Designer on Stellaris, it is your mission to conceive and implement captivating narratives, allowing players to explore their fantasies on a galactic scale. Additionally, you will be designing mechanics that will challenge and delight hardcore fans and new players alike.
   

  

 As a team, we concept and prototype, write narratives, and edit one another's work. Using our in-house scripting language, we bring our ideas to life. We research diligently and hunt everywhere for inspiration. We collaborate, challenge ourselves, and take pride in what we create.
   

  

 We aim to be the best in the business, and we set our sights on the stars.
   

  

 The skills we’re searching for…
   

  

* Fluent in English with an excellent command of written American English.
* Experience in narrative design or game design.
* Experience with or interest in code-based scripting.
* Ability to work independently and in collaboration with other developers with assigned tasks and take responsibility for delivering work according to the project’s schedule
* A strong passion for and interest in Stellaris and/or knowledge and experience of other Paradox Development Studio Grand Strategy Games


 We are seeking new team members who enjoy working in a team where everyone supports each other, but every individual designer is also given the freedom and responsibility to take charge of a task and to deliver. We care about quality and are motivated by the idea of our many fans around the world praising our work after release.
   

  

 Content Designers thrive in a modern, creative environment, where our colleagues enjoy their jobs as well as the games we make. The perfect candidate will not be afraid to raise issues, continuously strive to improve, and seek to inspire their teammates.
   

  

 At Paradox you will be part of a result driven, high trust and player-centric culture. Our games and players take center stage and our first priority is always to add player value. If you are someone who thrives from the opportunities that this culture brings and knows how to navigate the challenges that also come with it we highly encourage you to apply for this job and join our team.
